title: National Merit-cum-Means Scholarship Scheme
description: Financial assistance to meritorious students from economically weaker sections to encourage them to continue study at secondary stage.
benefits: Scholarship amount of ₹12,000 per annum (₹1,000 per month).
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly into the student's bank account.
documents: Income Certificate of parents (less than ₹3,50,000 per annum)
Class VIII Marksheet showing at least 55% marks (50% for SC/ST)
eligibilityText: Students of class IX whose parental income is not more than ₹3.5 Lakh per annum and who have scored minimum 55% in class VIII.
exclusionText: Students studying in Kendriya Vidyalayas, Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas, and private residential schools are not eligible.

faqs.q: Can a student of class X apply?
faqs.a: No, applications are typically submitted when entering class IX. However, renewals can be filed for classes X, XI, and XII.

faqs.q: Is there any relaxation in marks for SC/ST students?
faqs.a: Yes, there is a 5% relaxation in marks (50% required instead of 55%).

steps: Register on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP).
Fill in the application form and upload the necessary documents.
Submit the application for school verification.
Track application status using the application ID.

checklist.text: Did you score 55% or more in Class VIII (50% for SC/ST)?
Are you studying in a Government/Government-aided local body school?
Do you study in a residential school like KVs or JNVs?

description_hi: आर्थिक रूप से कमजोर वर्ग के छात्रों को प्रोत्साहित करने के लिए मेरिटरियस छात्रों को द्वितीयक चरण में अध्ययन जारी रखने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करना।
benefits_hi: प्रति वर्ष ₹12,000 (₹1,000 प्रति माह) की छात्रवृत्ति राशि।
प्रत्यक्ष लाभ प्राप्तकर्ता के बैंक खाते में सीधे भुगतान किया जाता है।
documents_hi: माता-पिता का आय प्रमाण पत्र (प्रति वर्ष ₹3,50,000 से कम)
कक्षा VIII का मार्कशीट (55% अंकों के साथ) (SC/ST के लिए 50%)

title: Pragati Scholarship Scheme for Girl Students
description: An initiative by AICTE to provide assistance for advancement of girls pursuing technical education (degree and diploma).
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum for every year of study as lump sum amount.
Can be used for college fee payment, computer purchase, books, stationery, equipment, etc.
documents: Income Certificate (family income under ₹8 Lakh per annum)
Admission letter for technical degree/diploma program
Declaration by Head of the Institution
eligibilityText: Girl student admitted to 1st year of Degree/Diploma course in any AICTE approved institution. Maximum two girls per family. Family income must be under ₹8,00,000 per annum.
exclusionText: Students admitted through management quota or pursuing non-technical courses are excluded.

faqs.q: Is this scholarship available for post-graduate students?
faqs.a: No, this is only for undergraduate degree or diploma programmes.

faqs.q: What is the maximum number of girl children per family eligible?
faqs.a: Maximum of 2 girls per family are eligible under this scheme.

steps: Go to National Scholarship Portal (NSP).
Register as a new user and fill in the details under AICTE schemes.
Select 'Pragati Scholarship Scheme' and fill out demographic and academic forms.
Upload college admission proof, fee receipts, and income certificates.
Submit application and follow institutional verification status.

checklist.text: Are you admitted in an AICTE-approved technical college?
Are you in the 1st year of your technical degree or diploma course?
Were you admitted via Management Quota?

title_hi: प्रगति छात्रवृत्ति योजना लड़की छात्राओं के लिए
description_hi: AICTE द्वारा एक पहल है जो तकनीकी शिक्षा (डिग्री और डिप्लोमा) के लिए लड़की छात्राओं को आगे बढ़ाने के लिए सहायता प्रदान करने के लिए।
benefits_hi: प्रति वर्ष प्रत्येक वर्ष के अध्ययन के लिए ₹50,000 की एकमुश्त राशि।
कॉलेज शुल्क भुगतान, कंप्यूटर खरीद, पुस्तकें, स्टेशनरी, उपकरण आदि के लिए उपयोग किया जा सकता है।
documents_hi: आय प्रमाण पत्र (परिवार का आय ₹8 लाख प्रति वर्ष)
तकनीकी डिग्री/डिप्लोमा प्रोग्राम के लिए प्रवेश पत्र

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC Students
description: Centrally sponsored scheme that provides financial assistance to Scheduled Caste students studying at post-matriculation or post-secondary stages.
benefits: 100% compulsory non-refundable fees (including tuition fees) are reimbursed.
Academic allowance ranging from ₹2,500 to ₹13,500 per year depending on the course.
documents: Income Certificate (family income under ₹2.5 Lakh per annum)
eligibilityText: Students belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC) pursuing post-matric studies. The annual income of parents/guardians should not exceed ₹2.5 Lakh.
exclusionText: Students pursuing studies through correspondence or those whose parents have income above ₹2.5 Lakh per annum are excluded.

faqs.q: Can students from other states studying in a state apply?
faqs.a: Yes, but they must apply through their home state portal or NSP under their home state guidelines.

faqs.q: Is the scholarship given if I repeat a class?
faqs.a: No, if you fail a class, the scholarship is discontinued for that class and resumes once you pass.

steps: Apply through the respective State Scholarship Portal or National Scholarship Portal (NSP).
Register, fill in educational history, caste certificate details, and income details.
Upload document copies signed by the student.
Submit and verify with the college registrar/scholarship desk.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid Scheduled Caste (SC) certificate?
Are you studying in Class 11, 12, graduation, post-graduation, or diploma?

title_hi: पोस्ट-मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति SC छात्रों के लिए
description_hi: केंद्र सरकार द्वारा प्रायोजित योजना जो पोस्ट-मैट्रिकुलेशन या पोस्ट-सेकेंडरी चरण में अध्ययनरत SC छात्रों को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: 100% अनिवार्य गैर-वापसी योग्य शुल्क (शिक्षा शुल्क सहित) का भुगतान किया जाता है।
वार्षिक शैक्षिक अनुमति ₹2,500 से ₹13,500 तक होती है, जो कोर्स पर निर्भर करती है।
documents_hi: जाति प्रमाण पत्र (SC स्थिति दिखाने वाला)
आय प्रमाण पत्र (परिवार का आय ₹2.5 लाख प्रति वर्ष)

title: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: An initiative by the Government of India that provides up to ₹6,000 per year in three equal installments as minimum income support to all landholder farmer families.
benefits: ₹6,000 per year paid in three equal installments of ₹2,000 every four months.
Paid directly into the bank accounts of farmer families.
eligibilityText: All landholding farmer families who own cultivable land in their names.
exclusionText: Institutional landholders, state/central government employees (active or retired), income tax payers in the last assessment year, professionals (doctors, engineers, lawyers) are excluded.

faqs.q: Is there any limit on land size for eligibility?
faqs.a: No, the scheme now covers all landholder farmer families, regardless of the size of their landholding.

faqs.q: Is a government retiree receiving pension eligible?
faqs.a: If the monthly pension is ₹10,000 or more, the retiree is excluded.

steps: Visit PM-KISAN official portal.
Go to 'Farmers Corner' and select 'New Farmer Registration'.
Enter Aadhaar number and state, then fill in details of agricultural land ownership.
Upload land documents and Aadhaar.
Submit application for verification by state nodal officers.

checklist.text: Do you own cultivable agricultural land in your name?
Did you pay income tax in the last assessment year?
Are you or any family member a serving/retired government employee?

description_hi: भारत सरकार द्वारा एक पहल है जो सभी जमींदार किसान परिवारों को तीन समान किस्तों में प्रति वर्ष ₹6,000 तक की न्यूनतम आय सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: प्रति वर्ष तीन समान किस्तों में ₹2,000 प्रति चार महीने का भुगतान।
किसान परिवारों के बैंक खातों में सीधे भुगतान किया जाता है।

title: Agri-Clinics and Agri-Business Centres (ACABC) Scheme
description: Financial support and training to agriculture graduates to set up commercial agri-ventures, offering extension services to farmers.
benefits: Free residential training in entrepreneurship development.
Subsidies up to 36% (44% for SC/ST and women) of project cost for setting up ventures.
Bank credit options with soft terms.
documents: Degree/Diploma in Agriculture or allied subjects
eligibilityText: Graduates/diploma holders in agriculture and allied areas (horticulture, veterinary science, dairy, poultry, fisheries). Age between 18 to 60 years.
exclusionText: Non-technical graduates or individuals with no formal education in agriculture-related fields are excluded.

faqs.q: What is the maximum project limit for individuals?
faqs.a: Maximum project cost limit is ₹20 Lakhs for individual projects and ₹100 Lakhs for group projects (up to 5 people).
The entrepreneurship training program is of 45 days.

steps: Apply online on MANAGE ACABC portal.
Participate in the screening test/interview.
Complete the 45 days training at a designated Nodal Training Cell.
Prepare project report and apply for bank loan under NABARD refinance facility.
Submit subsidy claim on completion of venture setup.

checklist.text: Do you hold a Degree/Diploma in Agriculture, Horticulture, Veterinary, or allied science?
Are you willing to undergo a 45-day training program to set up an agri-business?

title_hi: कृषि क्लिनिक और कृषि व्यवसाय केंद्र (ACABC) योजना
description_hi: कृषि स्नातकों को वाणिज्यिक कृषि उद्यम स्थापित करने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता और प्रशिक्षण प्रदान करना।
benefits_hi: उद्यमिता विकास के लिए मुफ्त आवासीय प्रशिक्षण।
व्यवसाय स्थापित करने के लिए परियोजना लागत का 36% (SC/ST और महिलाओं के लिए 44%) का सब्सिडी।
बैंक क्रेडिट विकल्पों के साथ मुलायम शर्तें।
documents_hi: कृषि या संबंधित विषयों में डिग्री/डिप्लोमा
प्रस्तावित व्यवसाय के लिए परियोजना रिपोर्ट
जाति प्रमाण पत्र (यदि उच्चतर सब्सिडी का दावा किया जाता है)

title: Jammu and Kashmir Horticulture Crop Insurance Scheme
description: State sponsored crop insurance support designed to protect apple and saffron growers of J&K from losses due to adverse weather events like hail, snow, drought, or floods.
ministry: Department of Horticulture, Government of J&K
benefits: Financial compensation for crop damage due to weather extremes.
Subsidized premium cost, with up to 50% premium borne by the UT Administration.
documents: Land ownership passbook/Girdawari showing horticulture cultivation
Certificate of crop sowing/grower identification from local horticulture officer
eligibilityText: Horticulture farmers cultivating apples, saffron, almonds, or walnuts who are residents of Jammu & Kashmir.
exclusionText: Farmers cultivating non-horticulture seasonal crops or residing in other states/UTs.

faqs.q: Which crops are covered under this scheme?
faqs.a: Apples, saffron, walnuts, almonds, and pears are covered.
Loss evaluation is done through random crop cutting experiments and site inspections by the Department of Horticulture and Insurance company representatives.

steps: Contact local Horticulture Extension Officer or registered insurance partner agents.
Fill out insurance proposal form and pay the farmer's share of premium.
Obtain insurance policy receipt.
Report damage within 72 hours of any severe weather event to the local department.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident/grower in Jammu and Kashmir?
Do you cultivate apple, saffron, walnuts, or almonds on your land?

title_hi: जम्मू और कश्मीर हार्टिकल्चर फसल बीमा योजना
description_hi: राज्य द्वारा समर्थित फसल बीमा समर्थन का डिज़ाइन जो जम्मू-कश्मीर के सेब और केसर उत्पादकों को हालात के कारण होने वाले हालात के कारण होने वाले नुकसान से बचाने के लिए है जैसे कि बिजली की कटौती, बर्फ, सूखा, या बाढ़।
ministry_hi: जम्मू-कश्मीर सरकार के विभाग ऑफ हार्टिकल्चर
benefits_hi: मौसम के चरम से फसल नुकसान के लिए वित्तीय मुआवजा.
सब्सिडाइज्ड प्रीमियम लागत, जिसमें यूटी प्रशासन द्वारा अधिकतम 50% प्रीमियम का भुगतान किया जाता है।
documents_hi: हार्टिकल्चर उत्पादन के लिए भूमि स्वामित्व पासबुक/गिरदावरी दिखाना
बैंक खाता विवरण (आधार से जुड़ा हुआ)
स्थानीय हार्टिकल्चर अधिकारी से फसल बोआई/उत्पादक पहचान पत्र

title: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
description: A flagship scheme of Government of India to provide collateral-free micro-loans up to ₹10 Lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small/micro enterprises.
benefits: Collateral-free loans categorized in three stages: Shishu (up to ₹50,000), Kishor (₹50,000 to ₹5 Lakhs), Tarun (₹5 Lakhs to ₹10 Lakhs).
No processing fees for Shishu loans.
documents: Mudra Application form filled out correctly
Address Proof of business and residence
Quotation of machinery/assets to be purchased
eligibilityText: Indian citizen owning a proprietary concern, partnership firm, private limited company, or small shop in manufacturing, trading, or service sectors.
exclusionText: Loans for agricultural crop cultivation and personal consumer purposes are excluded. Corporate/large enterprise loans are also excluded.

faqs.q: What is the interest rate for Mudra loans?
faqs.a: Interest rates depend on the lending bank and business profile but are generally highly competitive and capped.

faqs.q: Can I get a Mudra loan for buying a taxi?
faqs.a: Yes, loans for purchasing commercial vehicles (taxi, tractor, auto-rickshaw) are covered.

steps: Prepare a business project report or purchase quote.
Approach any public/private commercial bank, regional rural bank, or cooperative bank.
Fill in the Mudra application form under desired category (Shishu/Kishor/Tarun).
Submit identity proof, business proof, and quotation files.
Get sanction, receive MUDRA Debit Card for working capital draws.

checklist.text: Is your business proposal in manufacturing, service, or retail trade sectors (not direct farm crop cultivation)?
Are you currently a defaulter in any bank or financial institution?

description_hi: भारत सरकार का एक प्रमुख योजना जो गैर-निगमित, गैर-कृषि छोटे/माइक्रो उद्यमों को बिना बीमा के माइक्रो ऋण प्रदान करने के लिए है जो 10 लाख रुपये तक है।
benefits_hi: तीन चरणों में वर्गीकृत ऋण: शिशु (10 लाख रुपये तक), किशोर (10 लाख रुपये से 5 लाख रुपये तक), तरुण (5 लाख रुपये से 10 लाख रुपये तक).
शिशु ऋण के लिए कोई प्रसंस्करण शुल्क नहीं है।
documents_hi: मुद्रा आवेदन पत्र को सही ढंग से भरा हुआ
व्यवसाय और निवास का पता प्रमाण पत्र
प्रस्तावित शुरुआत/विस्तार के लिए परियोजना रिपोर्ट
खरीद के लिए मशीनरी/संपत्ति का उद्धरण

title: Stand-Up India Scheme
description: Financial support scheme facilitating bank loans between ₹10 Lakhs and ₹1 Crore to at least one Scheduled Caste (SC) or Scheduled Tribe (ST) borrower and at least one Woman borrower per bank branch for setting up a greenfield enterprise.
benefits: Composite loan (inclusive of term loan and working capital) between ₹10 Lakhs and ₹1 Crore.
Refinance window through SIDBI and credit guarantee protection.
eligibilityText: SC/ST and/or women entrepreneurs above 18 years of age. Greenfield enterprise only (first-time venture). Under group partnerships, at least 51% stake must be held by SC/ST or woman.
exclusionText: Existing businesses upgrading or expanding (non-greenfield) are excluded.

faqs.a: It means the first commercial venture of the beneficiary in manufacturing, services, or trading sector.
Banks may ask for collateral or a guarantee under Credit Guarantee Scheme for Stand-Up India (CGSUI).

steps: Register on the Stand-Up Mitra portal as a trainee or ready borrower.
Select bank branch, upload business plan and financial projections.
Bank processes the application and carries out due diligence.
Upon approval, loan is disbursed and borrower begins commercial installation.

checklist.text: Is this a first-time greenfield enterprise (not an expansion of an existing business)?
Are you a Scheduled Caste (SC) / Scheduled Tribe (ST) member, OR a Woman entrepreneur?
If it is a joint venture, do you hold at least 51% shareholding and controlling stake?

description_hi: वित्तीय समर्थन योजना जो कम से कम एक अनुसूचित जाति (एससी) या अनुसूचित जनजाति (एसटी) ऋणदाता और कम से कम एक महिला ऋणदाता प्रति बैंक शाखा के लिए 10 लाख रुपये से 1 करोड़ रुपये तक के बीच बैंक ऋण प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: कंपोजिट ऋण (शरीरिक ऋण और कार्यशील पूंजी के साथ) 10 लाख रुपये से 1 करोड़ रुपये के बीच।
SIDBI के माध्यम से पुनर्वित्त का दरवाजा और क्रेडिट गारंटी सुरक्षा।
documents_hi: एससी/एसटी स्थिति का प्रमाण पत्र (यदि लागू हो)
ग्रीनफील्ड स्थिति दिखाने वाला परियोजना रिपोर्ट

title: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY
description: The largest health assurance scheme in the world, providing a health cover of ₹5 Lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
benefits: Health cover of ₹5 Lakhs per family per year.
Covers up to 3 days of pre-hospitalization and 15 days post-hospitalization expenses.
Cashless and paperless access to healthcare services at empanelled hospitals.
documents: Ration Card or proof of family registration
PM-JAY Gold Card (issued after eligibility check)
eligibilityText: Families categorized under rural and urban socio-economic criteria of SECC-2011 database, or registered national BPL card holders.
exclusionText: Families owning 2/3/4-wheeler commercial vehicles, landlines, air conditioners, or government employees are excluded.

faqs.q: Is there any limit on family size?
faqs.a: No, there is no cap on family size or age of family members.
Yes, all pre-existing conditions are covered from day one of enrollment.

steps: Check eligibility on the 'Am I Eligible' portal using mobile number/ration card.
Visit an empanelled hospital or Ayushman Kiosk.
Produce Aadhaar and family proof to the Ayushman Mitra.
Receive Ayushman e-Card and avail cashless hospital treatments.

checklist.text: Are you registered in the SECC-2011 database or do you possess a state BPL ration card?
Does your family own a 3-wheeler or 4-wheeler commercial vehicle?

description_hi: दुनिया की सबसे बड़ी स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना, जो प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये के लिए द्वितीय और तृतीय स्तर के अस्पताल में भर्ती होने के लिए स्वास्थ्य बीमा प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये के लिए स्वास्थ्य बीमा।
3 दिनों के लिए अस्पताल में भर्ती होने से पहले और 15 दिनों के लिए अस्पताल में भर्ती होने के बाद के खर्चों को कवर करता है।
कैशलेस और कागज रहित स्वास्थ्य सेवाओं का उपयोग करने की अनुमति देता है जो पंजीकृत अस्पतालों में होता है।
documents_hi: राशन कार्ड या परिवार पंजीकरण का प्रमाण पत्र
पीएम-जेएय गोल्ड कार्ड (पात्रता जांच के बाद जारी किया गया)

title: Janani Suraksha Yojana (JSY)
description: A safe motherhood intervention under the National Health Mission (NHM) promoting institutional delivery among poor pregnant women, offering direct cash assistance.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1,400 to rural mothers and ₹1,000 to urban mothers in low-performing states.
Accompanying ASHA worker receives incentive for facilitating the delivery.
documents: BPL Ration Card/Government Certificate of lower income
eligibilityText: All pregnant women delivering in government health centers or accredited private hospitals. Special focus on SC/ST and BPL status mothers.
exclusionText: Home births without official auxiliary health worker attendance, and deliveries in unaccredited private clinics are excluded.

faqs.a: Yes, ideally, the cash payment is directly transferred to the mother's bank account before discharge.

faqs.q: Does this scheme cover caesarean sections?
faqs.a: Yes, government centers provide free caesarean sections, and additional institutional support is offered.

steps: Register the pregnancy at the nearest sub-center/ASHA worker within the first trimester.
Get regular ANC checkups done and update the MCP card.
Deliver child at a government hospital or empanelled private hospital.
Submit bank passbook and MCP card copy to the health facility accountant for payment release.

checklist.text: Do you hold a registered Mother-Child Protection (MCP) card?
Are you planning to deliver or did you deliver in a government/empanelled health facility?

description_hi: सुरक्षित मातृत्व हस्तक्षेप के तहत राष्ट्रीय स्वास्थ्य मिशन (एनएचएम) जो गरीब गर्भवती महिलाओं के प्रति संस्थागत प्रसव को बढ़ावा देती है, जो सीधी नकद सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: ग्रामीण माताओं को 1,400 रुपये और शहरी माताओं को 1,000 रुपये की वित्तीय सहायता।
सहायक आशा कार्यकर्ता को प्रसव को सुविधाजनक बनाने में मदद करने के लिए प्रोत्साहन प्राप्त होता है।
documents_hi: बीपीएल राशन कार्ड/सरकारी कम आय का प्रमाण पत्र
बैंक खाता विवरण (आधार से जुड़ा हुआ)
संस्थागत निकासी स्लिप/जन्म प्रमाण पत्र की प्रति

title: Sukanya Samriddhi Account (SSY)
description: A small deposit scheme of the Government of India dedicated to the girl child, offering tax benefits and guaranteed attractive interest rates for higher education/marriage.
benefits: High tax-free interest rates (reviewed quarterly).
Tax deductions under Section 80C of IT Act.
Triple tax exemptions (exempt-exempt-exempt).
documents: Birth certificate of the girl child
Identity and Address Proof of the parent/guardian (Aadhaar/PAN/Voter ID)
Passport size photographs of parent and child
eligibilityText: A legal guardian/parent can open an account in the name of a girl child from her birth till she attains the age of 10 years. Maximum of 2 accounts per family (one for each girl).
exclusionText: Accounts opened for boys, or for girl children above 10 years of age.

faqs.q: What is the minimum annual deposit?
faqs.a: A minimum of ₹250 must be deposited in a financial year, with a maximum limit of ₹1.5 Lakhs.
The account matures 21 years from the date of opening, or at the time of marriage of the girl child (after she turns 18).

steps: Visit any post office or authorized commercial bank branch.
Obtain and fill in the Sukanya Samriddhi Account opening form.
Attach birth certificate of the girl and KYC files of the parent.
Pay initial deposit (minimum ₹250 in cash/cheque).
Receive passbook to record recurring deposits.

checklist.text: Is the girl child under 10 years of age?
Is the number of Sukanya Samriddhi accounts in your family less than 2?

description_hi: भारत सरकार द्वारा लड़की के लिए समर्पित एक छोटा जमा योजना, जो कर लाभ और उच्च शिक्षा/विवाह के लिए आकर्षक ब्याज दरों के लिए सुनिश्चित करती है।
benefits_hi: चौथकी के अनुसार उच्च कर मुक्त ब्याज दरें।
कर कटौती आयकर अधिनियम की धारा 80सी के तहत।
त्रिगुण कर मुक्ति (मुक्त-मुक्त-मुक्त)।
documents_hi: माता-पिता का पहचान और पता प्रमाण (आधार/पैन/वोटर आईडी)
माता-पिता और बच्चे के पासपोर्ट आकार के फोटो

title: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
description: A government-backed pension scheme for citizens in the unorganized sector, guaranteeing a monthly pension ranging from ₹1,000 to ₹5,000 upon reaching age 60.
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1,000, ₹2,000, ₹3,000, ₹4,000 or ₹5,000 per month after age 60.
Same pension amount is paid to the spouse in case of death of the subscriber.
Accumulated corpus is returned to the nominee after both subscriber and spouse pass away.
documents: Mobile number linked to bank account
eligibilityText: Any Indian citizen between 18 and 40 years of age having a savings bank account.
exclusionText: Income tax payers and members of statutory social security schemes like EPFO, NPS, or government pension holders are excluded from joining APY.

faqs.q: What is the entry age bracket for APY?
faqs.a: Between 18 and 40 years. You must contribute for at least 20 years to get the pension.
Premature exit is permitted only under exceptional circumstances like terminal illness or death of the subscriber.

steps: Go to the bank branch where you hold a savings bank account.
Fill out the APY registration form, choose your pension tier (₹1000 - ₹5000), and auto-debit frequency (monthly/quarterly/half-yearly).
Ensure sufficient balance in bank account for auto-debit of premium.
Receive APY PRAN number and transaction receipt via SMS.

checklist.text: Are you an income tax payer?
Do you possess an active savings bank account with auto-debit facility?

description_hi: अनौपचारिक क्षेत्र के नागरिकों के लिए एक सरकारी समर्थित पेंशन योजना, जो 60 वर्ष की आयु पर 1,000 से 5,000 रुपये प्रति माह की निश्चित पेंशन की गारंटी देती है।
benefits_hi: सब्सक्राइबर की मृत्यु के मामले में पति/पत्नी को समान पेंशन राशि दी जाती है।
दोनों सब्सक्राइबर और पति/पत्नी की मृत्यु के बाद जमा कोष को नामित व्यक्ति को वापस किया जाता है।
documents_hi: बैंक खाते से जुड़ा मोबाइल नंबर

title: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
description: Financial assistance program providing monthly pension of ₹200 to ₹500 to elderly citizens belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹200 for BPL elderly aged 60-79 years.
Increased pension of ₹500 per month for BPL elderly aged 80 years and above.
States often add a matching share to double or triple this base pension.
documents: BPL Ration Card showing name of beneficiary
Age proof certificate (Birth certificate, School leaving card, or Medical certificate)
Bank Account details (preferably Jan Dhan or post office savings account)
eligibilityText: Indian citizen aged 60 years or above, who belongs to a household living Below Poverty Line (BPL) according to national BPL lists.
exclusionText: Elderly citizens whose families are not in the official BPL register, or those receiving pension from other institutional sources.

faqs.a: It is credited monthly directly into the bank account or post office account of the beneficiary.

faqs.q: Can I apply if my name is not in the BPL list but I have low income?
faqs.a: You must obtain an official BPL certificate or get your name enrolled in the BPL census list to qualify for IGNOAPS.

steps: Collect application form from Block Development Officer (BDO) or Gram Panchayat office.
Attach verified BPL document copy and age proof.
Submit application to Block office or Social Welfare officer.
Gram Sabha verifies the credentials; pension list is updated.

checklist.text: Does your household hold a valid, active BPL ration card/certificate?
Are you 60 years of age or older?

title_hi: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्रीय पुरानी आयु पेंशन योजना (आईजीएनओएपीएस)
description_hi: गरीबी रेखा से नीचे के परिवारों के बुजुर्ग नागरिकों को मासिक पेंशन का वित्तीय सहायता कार्यक्रम प्रदान करता है, जो 200 से 500 रुपये के बीच है।
benefits_hi: 60-79 वर्ष की आयु के बीपीएल बुजुर्गों के लिए 200 रुपये प्रति माह की पेंशन।
80 वर्ष से अधिक आयु के बीपीएल बुजुर्गों के लिए 500 रुपये प्रति माह की पेंशन।
राज्य अक्सर आधार पेंशन को दोगुना या तिगुना करने के लिए एक साथी हिस्सा जोड़ते हैं।
documents_hi: बीपीएल राशन कार्ड में लाभार्थी का नाम
आयु प्रमाण पत्र (जन्म प्रमाण पत्र, स्कूल छोड़ने का प्रमाण पत्र, या चिकित्सा प्रमाण पत्र)
बैंक खाता विवरण (प्राथमिक तौर पर जन धन या पोस्ट ऑफिस बचत खाता)

title: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: An accidental insurance scheme offering ₹2 Lakhs cover for death or total disability due to accident, at a nominal premium of ₹20 per year.
benefits: Accidental death cover of ₹2 Lakhs.
Disability cover of ₹2 Lakhs for total irrecoverable loss of both eyes or loss of use of both hands/feet.
Partial disability cover of ₹1 Lakh for loss of one eye/hand/foot.
documents: Consent form for auto-debit of premium
eligibilityText: Indian citizen aged 18 to 70 years with an active savings bank account linked to auto-debit.
exclusionText: Non-residents of India and individuals outside the age range of 18-70 years.

faqs.q: What is the annual premium and when is it deducted?
faqs.a: Premium is ₹20 per year, auto-debited from the subscriber's bank account on or before 31st May each year.
No, suicide or intentional self-injury is excluded. It covers only accidental deaths and injuries.

steps: Approach your home bank branch or check your bank's mobile app/internet banking.
Submit the PMSBY consent-cum-declaration form.
Verify nominee details and submit auto-debit consent.
The bank auto-deducts the ₹20 fee and issues a Certificate of Insurance.

checklist.text: Do you give consent for automatic annual debit of ₹20 from your savings account?
Are you between 18 and 70 years of age?

description_hi: एक दुर्घटना बीमा योजना जो एक वर्ष के लिए 20 रुपये के नाममात्र प्रीमियम पर दुर्घटना के कारण मृत्यु या कुल अक्षमता के लिए 2 लाख रुपये कवर प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: दुर्घटना के कारण 2 लाख रुपये का मृत्यु कवर।
दोनों आंखों या दोनों हाथ/पैरों की कुल अक्षमता के लिए 2 लाख रुपये का अक्षमता कवर।
एक आंख/हाथ/पैर की क्षति के लिए 1 लाख रुपये का अक्षमता कवर।
documents_hi: नामित व्यक्ति के विवरण (आधार और संबंध प्रमाण)
प्रीमियम के लिए ऑटो-डेबिट के लिए सहमति पत्र

title: Uttar Pradesh Mukhya Mantri Kanya Sumangala Yojana
description: State sponsored cash assistance program in Uttar Pradesh that provides conditional monetary grants to girls from birth till graduation to promote education and prevent female foeticide.
ministry: Women and Child Development Department, Uttar Pradesh
benefits: Total financial assistance of ₹15,000 distributed in 6 installments corresponding to milestones (birth, vaccination, class 1, class 6, class 9, and degree/diploma admission).
documents: Income certificate (family income under ₹3 Lakh per annum)
Birth certificate of the girl child
Aadhaar Card of girl child and parent
Joint bank account passbook of girl and guardian
eligibilityText: Parents who are permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh. The annual income of the family must not exceed ₹3 Lakh. Maximum of two girls per family.
exclusionText: Families with annual income above ₹3 Lakh, or having more than two children (unless twin girls are born in the second delivery).

faqs.q: What happens if there are twin girls in the second delivery?
faqs.a: If twin girls are born, they will both be eligible, bringing the family count limit to three daughters.

faqs.q: Is the grant paid in cash?
faqs.a: No, it is paid via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into the bank account.

steps: Apply online on the MKSY portal.
Register as parent/guardian and create family ID.
Select the milestone stage for which the child is eligible.
Upload birth certificate, immunization proof, or admission receipts.
Verification by block/town child welfare committee and fund release.

checklist.text: Are the parents permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh?
Is the number of active children in your family 2 or fewer (except twin girls)?

title_hi: उत्तर प्रदेश मुख्यमंत्री कन्या सम्मान योजना
description_hi: उत्तर प्रदेश में एक राज्य-समर्थित नकद सहायता कार्यक्रम जो लड़कियों को जन्म से स्नातकोत्तर तक शिक्षा और महिला भ्रूण हत्या को रोकने के लिए प्रोत्साहित करने के लिए स्थितियों पर आधारित वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करता है।
ministry_hi: उत्तर प्रदेश महिला और बाल विकास विभाग
benefits_hi: जन्म, टीकाकरण, कक्षा 1, कक्षा 6, कक्षा 9 और स्नातक/डिप्लोमा प्रवेश के मील के पत्थरों के साथ 6 किस्तों में कुल 15,000 रुपये की वित्तीय सहायता।
documents_hi: माता-पिता का उत्तर प्रदेश निवास प्रमाण पत्र
परिवार की आय प्रमाण पत्र (प्रति वर्ष 3 लाख रुपये से कम आय)
कक्षा 1/6/9/डिग्री प्रवेश के लिए प्रवेश शुल्क का प्राप्ति पत्र
लड़की और अभिभावक का आधार कार्ड
लड़की और अभिभावक के संयुक्त बैंक खाता पासबुक

title: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme (MNSSY)
description: An education loan scheme by Bihar government providing low-interest education loans up to ₹4 Lakhs to students passing class 12 to pursue higher professional studies.
ministry: Bihar State Education Finance Corporation, Government of Bihar
benefits: Education loans up to ₹4 Lakhs covering tuition fees, hostel, books, and laptops.
Extremely low interest rate of 4% simple interest (only 1% simple interest for women, disabled, and transgender candidates).
No collateral or third-party guarantee required.
documents: Proof of admission in recognized higher education college
Fee structure issued by the institution
Aadhaar Card of student and co-borrower
Income tax returns/Income certificate of co-borrower
eligibilityText: Permanent resident of Bihar, aged 30 years or below. Must have cleared Intermediate (Class 12) from Bihar board or other boards in Bihar.
exclusionText: Students pursuing studies in unrecognized colleges, or distance learning programs. Students above 30 years are excluded.

faqs.a: Repayment moratorium is till the completion of the course plus 1 year, or when the student gets a job, whichever is earlier.

faqs.q: Can I study outside Bihar using this scheme?
faqs.a: Yes, as long as the institute is recognized by the Bihar government and listed on their portal.

steps: Apply online on the 7 Nishchay (MNSSY) portal or mobile app.
Submit student and co-borrower details, select the course and college.
Visit the District Registration and Counseling Centre (DRCC) for document verification with original files.
Get the loan agreement processed.
The loan amount is disbursed directly to the college bank account.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident/domicile of Bihar?
Have you successfully passed 12th standard (Intermediate) or equivalent?

description_hi: बिहार सरकार द्वारा शिक्षा ऋण योजना जो छात्रों को कक्षा 12 पास करने के बाद उच्च पेशेवर अध्ययन के लिए ₹4 लाख तक के कम ब्याज दरों पर शिक्षा ऋण प्रदान करती है।
ministry_hi: बिहार राज्य शिक्षा वित्त निगम, बिहार सरकार
benefits_hi: शिक्षा ऋण ₹4 लाख तक कवर करता है जिसमें शुल्क, होस्टल, पुस्तकें, और लैपटॉप शामिल हैं।
बेहद कम ब्याज दर 4% साधारण ब्याज (केवल महिलाओं, विकलांग, और तृतीय लिंग उम्मीदवारों के लिए 1% साधारण ब्याज)।
कोई संपत्ति या तृतीय पक्ष की गारंटी की आवश्यकता नहीं है।
documents_hi: कक्षा 10वीं और 12वीं के अंक और प्रमाण पत्र
प्रवर्गीकृत उच्च शिक्षा कॉलेज में प्रवेश का प्रमाण पत्र
छात्र और सह-धारक का आधार कार्ड
सह-धारक के आयकर रिटर्न/आय प्रमाण पत्र

title: Telangana Rythu Bandhu Scheme
description: Agricultural investment support scheme by the Government of Telangana, providing ₹5,000 per acre per season to land-owning farmers for purchase of seeds, fertilizers, and field inputs.
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana
benefits: Financial support of ₹5,000 per acre per crop season (Kharif and Rabi).
Direct bank transfer to the land-owning farmer's bank account.
documents: Bank Account Passbook linked with Aadhaar
eligibilityText: Land-owning farmers who are residents of Telangana State. The land must be cultivable agricultural land.
exclusionText: Non-farmers, commercial lease holders without title deeds, and corporate landholders are excluded.

faqs.q: Is there any limit on landholding size for Rythu Bandhu?
faqs.a: No, the benefit is given to all land-owning farmers in proportion to their land acreage.
Currently, only Pattadars (registered land owners) receive the direct investment support.

steps: Register land records in the Dharani portal of Telangana.
Submit your bank details and Aadhaar linkage verification to the local Agriculture Extension Officer (AEO).
Wait for the state disbursement cycle to receive credit via DBT.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident/domicile of Telangana?
Do you possess a Pattadar land passbook?

description_hi: तेलंगाना सरकार द्वारा किसानों को बीज, उर्वरक, और खेती के अन्य सामग्री के लिए ₹5,000 प्रति एकड़ प्रति मौसम के लिए कृषि निवेश समर्थन योजना प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: कृषि निवेश समर्थन के रूप में ₹5,000 प्रति एकड़ प्रति फसल मौसम (खरीफ और रबी के लिए)।
भूमि-स्वामी किसान के बैंक खाते में सीधे बैंक ट्रांसफर।
documents_hi: आधार से जुड़े बैंक खाते का पासबुक

title: Telangana Rythu Bima Scheme
description: A group life insurance scheme that provides immediate financial relief of ₹5 Lakhs to the families of deceased farmers in Telangana.
ministry: Department of Agriculture, Government of Telangana
benefits: Life insurance cover of ₹5,000,000 paid to the nominee within 10 days.
100% premium paid by the State Government.
documents: Aadhaar Card of farmer and nominee
eligibilityText: Land-owning farmers of Telangana aged 18 to 59 years.
exclusionText: Farmers outside the age group of 18-59 or non-landowners.

faqs.q: What is the premium cost for farmers?
faqs.a: It is completely free; the government pays the entire premium.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Submit nomination forms to local Agriculture Extension Officer.
Sync records with Dharani land portal.
Insurance certificate is generated.

checklist.text: Are you between 18 and 59 years old?

description_hi: एक समूह जीवन बीमा योजना जो तेलंगाना में मृत किसानों के परिवारों को ₹5 लाख की तुरंत वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: जीवन बीमा कवर ₹5,000,000 नामित व्यक्ति को 10 दिनों के भीतर दिया जाता है।
राज्य सरकार द्वारा 100% प्रीमियम का भुगतान किया जाता है।
documents_hi: किसान और नामित व्यक्ति का आधार कार्ड

title: KCR Kit Scheme
description: A welfare program for pregnant women in Telangana that provides financial support of ₹12,000 (₹13,000 for girl child) along with a baby care kit consisting of 16 essential items.
ministry: Department of Health, Medical & Family Welfare, Telangana
benefits: Baby care kit with baby soap, powder, oil, mosquito net, toys, etc.
Financial aid of ₹12,000 for a male child and ₹13,000 for a female child.
eligibilityText: Pregnant women who are residents of Telangana delivering in government hospitals.
exclusionText: Deliveries in private hospitals or mothers who have more than two children.

faqs.q: How many times can a mother avail this?
faqs.a: A mother can avail KCR Kit for her first two deliveries only.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register on KCR Kit portal via nearest Government Health Center.
Complete regular checkups.
Deliver child at a government hospital.
Receive kit and direct bank transfers.

checklist.text: Will you be delivering in a government hospital in Telangana?
Is this your first or second delivery?

description_hi: तेलंगाना में गर्भवती महिलाओं के लिए एक कल्याण कार्यक्रम जो 16 आवश्यक वस्तुओं के साथ एक शिशु देखभाल किट प्रदान करता है और ₹12,000 (₹13,000 लड़की के लिए) का वित्तीय समर्थन प्रदान करता है।
ministry_hi: स्वास्थ्य, चिकित्सा और परिवार कल्याण विभाग, तेलंगाना
benefits_hi: शिशु देखभाल किट में शिशु साबुन, पाउडर, तेल, मच्छरदानी, खिलौने, आदि शामिल हैं।
₹12,000 का वित्तीय सहायता एक पुरुष बच्चे के लिए और ₹13,000 एक महिला बच्चे के लिए।

title: Kalyana Lakshmi Pathakam
description: Financial assistance of ₹1,01,116 given to unmarried girls from SC, ST, BC, and EBC communities in Telangana at the time of their marriage.
ministry: Social Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
benefits: One-time financial assistance of ₹101,116 directly credited to the bride's mother's account.
eligibilityText: Unmarried girls from SC, ST, BC, EBC communities who are residents of Telangana. Bride must be at least 18 years old.
exclusionText: Families with combined annual income exceeding ₹2 Lakh (Urban) or ₹1.5 Lakh (Rural).

faqs.a: EBC (Economically Backward Classes) are covered, but General class above income limits are excluded.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on Telangana ePass portal under Kalyana Lakshmi tab.
Upload required certificates and photo.
MRO/Welfare Officer inspects and approves.
Fund is disbursed.

checklist.text: Is the bride at least 18 years of age at marriage?
Is the bride's family a permanent resident of Telangana?

description_hi: तेलंगाना में अन्य पिछड़े वर्ग, अनुसूचित जाति, अनुसूचित जनजाति और अन्य पिछड़े वर्गों की बिना विवाहित लड़कियों को उनके विवाह के समय ₹1,01,116 का वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: एक बार का वित्तीय सहायता ₹101,116 सीधे दुल्हन की मां के खाते में जमा किया जाता है।
documents_hi: दुल्हन की मां का आधार कार्ड
दुल्हन की मां का बैंक पासबुक

title: Shaadi Mubarak Scheme
description: Financial marriage assistance of ₹1,01,116 given to unmarried minority girls (Muslims, Christians, Sikhs, etc.) in Telangana at the time of their marriage.
ministry: Minority Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
benefits: One-time wedding incentive of ₹101,116 directly transferred to the bride's mother's bank account.
documents: Wedding invitation and birth certificate of bride
eligibilityText: Unmarried minority girls who are residents of Telangana and whose parental income is under ₹2 Lakh per year.
exclusionText: Non-minority communities or families with annual income exceeding ₹2 Lakh.

faqs.q: Is bride's mother's bank account mandatory?
faqs.a: Yes, the disbursement is strictly made to the bride's mother's account.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register online on Telangana ePass portal.
Upload income and community certificates.
Revenue officials verify details.
Direct credit is sent.

checklist.text: Do you belong to a religious minority community (Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Parsi, Buddhist)?

description_hi: असहाय अल्पसंख्यक लड़कियों (मुस्लिम, ईसाई, सिख, आदि) को उनकी शादी के समय टेलंगाना में ₹1,01,116 का वित्तीय विवाह सहायता दिया जाता है।
benefits_hi: ₹101,116 का एक बार का शादी का प्रोत्साहन सीधे दुल्हन की मां के बैंक खाते में स्थानांतरित किया जाता है।
documents_hi: दुल्हन और मां के आधार कार्ड
शादी का आमंत्रण पत्र और दुल्हन का जन्म प्रमाण पत्र

title: Telangana Aasara Pension (Old Age)
description: A social security pension scheme providing monthly financial assistance of ₹2,016 to senior citizens in Telangana.
ministry: Society for Elimination of Rural Poverty (SERP), Telangana
benefits: Monthly cash pension of ₹2,016 directly credited to bank/post office accounts.
documents: Age proof (Voter ID or school memo)
eligibilityText: Elderly citizens of Telangana aged 57 years and above belonging to BPL households.
exclusionText: Individuals holding more than 7.5 acres of dry land or 3 acres of wet land, or having government-employed children.

faqs.a: The eligibility age was reduced from 65 to 57 years recently.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Collect application from Meeseva or Gram Panchayat.
Submit with age and BPL proof.
Verification by Panchayat Secretary/Bill Collector.
Sanction of Aasara pension card.

checklist.text: Are you 57 years of age or older?

description_hi: एक सामाजिक सुरक्षा पेंशन योजना जो टेलंगाना में वरिष्ठ नागरिकों को मासिक वित्तीय सहायता के रूप में ₹2,016 प्रदान करती है।
ministry_hi: ग्रामीण गरीबी उन्मूलन के लिए समाज (एसईआरपी), टेलंगाना
benefits_hi: ₹2,016 का मासिक नकद पेंशन सीधे बैंक/डाकघर खातों में जमा किया जाता है।
documents_hi: उम्र प्रमाण पत्र (वोटर आईडी या स्कूल मेमो)

title: Telangana Aasara Pension (Disabled)
description: Social security pension providing monthly financial support of ₹3,016 (increased to ₹4,016) to persons with disabilities in Telangana.
ministry: Department for Disabled Welfare, Government of Telangana
benefits: Monthly financial pension of ₹4,016 paid directly to bank account.
eligibilityText: Differently-abled citizens of Telangana with a minimum of 40% disability certified by SADAREM.
exclusionText: Individuals with less than 40% disability, or those receiving pension from other state/central government departments.

faqs.a: SADAREM is the computerised disability assessment system in Telangana used to verify disability certificates.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Obtain SADAREM certificate from government hospital.
Apply online or via local Gram Panchayat/Ward Office.
Verification by local officials.
Pension activation.

checklist.text: Do you possess a valid SADAREM certificate with 40% or more disability?

description_hi: विकलांग व्यक्तियों को टेलंगाना में मासिक वित्तीय सहायता के रूप में ₹3,016 (बढ़कर ₹4,016) प्रदान करने वाली सामाजिक सुरक्षा पेंशन योजना।
benefits_hi: ₹4,016 का मासिक वित्तीय पेंशन सीधे बैंक खाते में जमा किया जाता है।

title: Telangana Aarogyasri Scheme
description: A flagship health insurance scheme providing cashless hospital treatment up to ₹10 Lakhs per family per year for identified therapies in empanelled hospitals.
benefits: Cashless medical coverage up to ₹10 Lakhs per family per year.
Covers 1,000+ medical and surgical procedures.
documents: Aarogyasri Card or BPL Ration Card
Aadhaar Card of all family members
eligibilityText: BPL families of Telangana who hold a valid Food Security (Ration) Card.
exclusionText: Families with income above BPL limits or government employees (covered under employee health scheme instead).

faqs.a: The coverage limit was increased to ₹10 Lakhs per family per year in 2023.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Present your Aarogyasri Card or Ration Card at any empanelled hospital.
Aarogyasri coordinator (Aarogya Mithra) guides the patient.
Pre-authorization is submitted online.
Cashless treatment is provided.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid Telangana Food Security Card (Ration Card)?

description_hi: एक प्रमुख स्वास्थ्य बीमा योजना जो टेलंगाना में परिवार प्रति वर्ष 10 लाख रुपये तक कैशलेस अस्पताल उपचार प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: 10 लाख रुपये तक कैशलेस चिकित्सा कवरेज प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष।
1,000+ चिकित्सा और शल्य चिकित्सा प्रक्रियाओं को कवर करता है।
documents_hi: आरोग्यश्री कार्ड या बीपीएल राशन कार्ड

title: Telangana Dalit Bandhu Scheme
description: A flagship program aimed at Dalit empowerment, offering a one-time direct grant of ₹10 Lakhs per family to SC households to set up any self-employment business.
benefits: Direct financial grant of ₹10 Lakhs per household.
100% subsidy, no bank loan component or repayment required.
eligibilityText: Scheduled Caste (SC) families residing in Telangana. One grant per family.
exclusionText: Non-SC families or government employees.

faqs.q: Is there a bank loan involved?
faqs.a: No, it is a 100% grant. The beneficiary does not have to pay back a single rupee.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Identification of eligible SC families by district committees.
Sanction of scheme limit to beneficiary special bank account.
Purchase of equipment/business assets through vendor coordination.

checklist.text: Do you belong to the Scheduled Caste (SC) community?
Does any member of your family hold a government job?

description_hi: एक प्रमुख कार्यक्रम जो दलित सशक्तिकरण के लिए लक्षित है, जो एससी परिवारों को किसी भी आत्मनिर्भर व्यवसाय के लिए 10 लाख रुपये का एक बार का सीधा अनुदान प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: 10 लाख रुपये का सीधा वित्तीय अनुदान प्रति परिवार।
100% सब्सिडी, कोई बैंक ऋण घटक या वापसी की आवश्यकता नहीं है।
documents_hi: परिवार के प्रमुख का आधार कार्ड

title: Telangana ePASS Post-Matric Scholarship
description: Post-matric scholarship and fee reimbursement scheme for student empowerment, covering full college tuition fee and college hostel maintenance charges.
benefits: 100% fee reimbursement of tuition fee for eligible courses.
Monthly maintenance allowance (Mess charges) of ₹1,500 to ₹2,500.
eligibilityText: Students of SC/ST/BC/EBC communities studying in intermediate, graduation, or professional courses in Telangana.
exclusionText: Parental annual income exceeding ₹2 Lakh (for SC/ST) or ₹1.5 Lakh (for BC/EBC in rural, ₹2 Lakh in urban).

faqs.q: Can students studying in management quota apply?
faqs.a: No, management quota students are strictly ineligible.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on the Telangana ePASS website.
Fill out educational history and upload scanned certificate copies.
College principal verifies details online.
District officer approves and releases funds.

checklist.text: Were you admitted to your college through the Convener Quota (CET exam)?

description_hi: पोस्ट-मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति और शुल्क प्रतिपूर्ति योजना छात्र सशक्तिकरण के लिए, पूरे कॉलेज शुल्क और कॉलेज होस्टल रखरखाव शुल्क को कवर करती है।
benefits_hi: उचित पाठ्यक्रमों के लिए 100% शुल्क प्रतिपूर्ति.
मासिक रखरखाव अनुमति (मेस शुल्क) ₹1,500 से ₹2,500 तक।

title: Ambedkar Overseas Vidya Nidhi
description: Financial assistance up to ₹20 Lakhs granted to SC, ST, BC, and Minority students of Telangana to pursue post-graduate and PhD courses abroad.
ministry: Minority & Backward Classes Welfare Departments, Telangana
benefits: Financial grant of ₹20 Lakhs paid in two installments.
One-way economy airfare reimbursement and visa fee assistance.
documents: Admission offer letter from recognized foreign university
eligibilityText: Graduates belonging to SC/ST/BC/Minority communities in Telangana with family income under ₹5 Lakhs per year.
exclusionText: Students with family income above ₹5 Lakhs or those who have already availed this benefit.

faqs.a: USA, UK, Australia, Canada, Singapore, Germany, France, and Japan are among eligible countries.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register online on Telangana ePASS portal.
Upload visa, admission letter, passport, and scorecards.
Attend verification committee interview.
Sanction of scholarship fund.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid visa and admission letter from a foreign university?
Have you qualified in GRE/GMAT and IELTS/TOEFL?

description_hi: तेलंगाना के एससी, एसटी, बीसी, और माइनॉरिटी छात्रों को विदेशी विश्वविद्यालयों में पोस्ट-ग्रेजुएट और पीएचडी कोर्स पूरा करने के लिए ₹20 लाख तक की वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान की जाती है।
ministry_hi: माइनॉरिटी & बैकवर्ड क्लासेज वेलफेयर विभाग, तेलंगाना
benefits_hi: दो किस्तों में ₹20 लाख का वित्तीय अनुदान प्राप्त होता है।
एकतरफा अर्थव्यवस्था विमान यात्रा शुल्क प्रतिपूर्ति और वीजा शुल्क सहायता।
documents_hi: मान्यता प्राप्त विदेशी विश्वविद्यालय से प्रवेश प्रस्ताव पत्र
आय प्रमाण पत्र (प्रति वर्ष ₹5 लाख तक)

title: Telangana Gruha Lakshmi Scheme
description: A housing support scheme providing a one-time grant of ₹3 Lakhs to women heads of BPL households to construct a permanent house on their own land plots.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹300,000 in three stages based on construction progress.
The amount is 100% subsidy, not a bank loan.
documents: Aadhaar Card of the woman head
eligibilityText: Homeless BPL families in Telangana who own a house plot. The grant is issued in the name of the female head of the family.
exclusionText: Families who do not own a plot, or already have a concrete (RCC) house, or do not hold a BPL card.

faqs.q: Can the plot be in the husband's name?
faqs.a: The scheme encourages the plot to be in the woman's name or registered jointly.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Submit application form at district collectorate or municipal ward office during public outreach.
Field verification of plot ownership and BPL status.
Stage-wise fund credit to bank account.

checklist.text: Do you own a vacant residential plot of land in Telangana?

description_hi: एक आवास समर्थन योजना जो महिला बीपीएल परिवारों के स्वामित्व वाले जमीन के प्लॉट पर स्थायी घर बनाने के लिए एक बार का अनुदान ₹3 लाख प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: निर्माण प्रगति के आधार पर तीन चरणों में ₹300,000 का वित्तीय सहायता।
राशि 100% सब्सिडी, बैंक ऋण नहीं है।

title: Telangana 2 BHK Dignity Housing Scheme
description: A public housing program providing fully constructed, free double-bedroom flats to shelterless BPL families in rural and urban Telangana.
benefits: A free double-bedroom house with kitchen, hall, and two bathrooms.
Fully subsidized infrastructure (electricity, drinking water, roads).
documents: Affidavit of not owning any permanent house
eligibilityText: Shelterless BPL families who are permanent residents of Telangana.
exclusionText: Families already owning a concrete house or holding government employment.

faqs.q: What is the cost of the house to the beneficiary?
faqs.a: The house is given 100% free. No contribution is required from the BPL beneficiary.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply through local Meeseva center or Gram Sabha.
Revenue department conducts field inspection.
Beneficiary list is drawn and houses allotted via public lottery.

checklist.text: Do you certify that you do not own any permanent concrete (pucca) house anywhere in India?

description_hi: एक सार्वजनिक आवास कार्यक्रम जो ग्रामीण और शहरी तेलंगाना में बीपीएल परिवारों को आश्रय प्रदान करने के लिए पूरी तरह से निर्मित, मुफ्त डबल-बेडरूम फ्लैट प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: एक मुफ्त डबल-बेडरूम घर जिसमें रसोई, हॉल, और दो बाथरूम हैं।
पूरी तरह से सब्सिडी की गई संरचना (विद्युत, पीने का पानी, सड़कें)।
documents_hi: स्थायी घर नहीं होने का प्रतिज्ञापत्र

title: Telangana Sheep Distribution Scheme
description: A livestock subsidy program providing sheep units to traditional shepherd communities (Yadava and Kuruma) at 75% government subsidy to boost rural economy.
benefits: One sheep unit consisting of 20 sheep and 1 ram.
75% of the unit cost is borne by the government, only 25% is farmer's share.
Free veterinary insurance cover.
documents: Caste Certificate showing Yadava or Kuruma community
Bank receipt of 25% farmer share contribution
Membership certificate in primary sheep breeders cooperative society
eligibilityText: Traditional shepherds belonging to Yadava/Kuruma caste in Telangana, aged 18 years and above.
exclusionText: Individuals who are not members of the Cooperative Society or residing in urban municipal corporations.

faqs.a: The unit cost is ₹1.75 Lakh, out of which the government subsidy is ₹1.31 Lakh.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register membership in local primary sheep breeders cooperative society (PSBCS).
Pay the 25% share at designated bank.
Procurement committee purchases and tags the sheep.
Transport and handover to beneficiary.

checklist.text: Do you belong to the Yadava or Kuruma shepherd communities?

description_hi: एक पशुपालन सब्सिडी कार्यक्रम जो पारंपरिक शेफर्ड समुदाय (यादव और कुरुमा) को 75% सरकारी सब्सिडी के साथ मुर्गी इकाई प्रदान करता है ताकि ग्रामीण अर्थव्यवस्था को बढ़ावा मिले।
benefits_hi: एक मुर्गी इकाई जिसमें 20 मुर्गी और 1 बकरा।
सरकार द्वारा 75% इकाई की लागत का भुगतान किया जाता है, केवल 25% किसान का हिस्सा।
मुफ्त पशु बीमा कवर।
documents_hi: जाति प्रमाण पत्र जो यादव या कुरुमा समुदाय को दर्शाता है।
बैंक रिसेप्ट 25% किसान के हिस्से का भुगतान
प्राथमिक मुर्गी प्रजनक सहकारी समिति का सदस्यता प्रमाण पत्र

title: Telangana Ku Haritha Haram
description: A massive afforestation project providing free saplings of fruits, timber, and medicinal plants to rural households, farmers, and institutions to increase green cover.
benefits: Free supply of plants, fruit saplings, and organic compost from local nurseries.
Wages under MGNREGS for plant pit digging and maintenance.
documents: Ration Card (if claiming wages under MGNREGS)
eligibilityText: All residents, farmers, and organizations in Telangana. Open to everyone.
exclusionText: None. Saplings are distributed to all citizens.

faqs.a: Yes, mango, guava, and sapota saplings are distributed for household gardens.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit nearest government forest nursery in your block.
Select saplings and sign the register.
Take saplings and plant them in your fields or houses.

checklist.text: Are you willing to plant and ensure the survival of saplings in your plot?

description_hi: एक बड़े पैमाने पर वनस्पति परियोजना जो ग्रामीण परिवारों, किसानों और संस्थानों को मुफ्त फल, लकड़ी और औषधीय पौधों के बीज प्रदान करके हरित कवर बढ़ाने के लिए प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: स्थानीय नर्सरी से मुफ्त पौधे, फल के बीज और जैविक कंपोस्ट की आपूर्ति।
एमजीएनआरईजी के तहत पौधा गड्ढा खोदने और रखरखाव के लिए मजदूरी
documents_hi: राशन कार्ड (यदि एमजीएनआरईजी के तहत मजदूरी का दावा करते हैं)
कृषि-वनस्पति किसानों के लिए भूमि पासबुक

title: Telangana T-PRIDE Scheme
description: Industrial incentive program providing special investment subsidies, interest rebates, and power tariffs for businesses set up by SC/ST entrepreneurs.
benefits: 35% to 45% investment subsidy on fixed capital investment.
Reimbursement of 100% stamp duty and land conversion charges.
Interest subsidy under Pavala Vaddi scheme.
eligibilityText: SC and ST entrepreneurs in Telangana establishing new micro or small manufacturing/service enterprises.
exclusionText: Medium or large scale businesses, or enterprises set up by non-SC/ST general categories.

faqs.a: The maximum investment subsidy cap is ₹75 Lakhs for SC/ST entrepreneurs.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on TS-iPASS single-window portal.
Upload industrial approvals and project report.
Submit investment claim with invoices.
Disbursement of subsidy funds.

checklist.text: Do you hold SC or ST caste credentials and own at least 51% of the business?

description_hi: एससी/एसटी उद्यमियों द्वारा स्थापित व्यवसायों के लिए विशेष निवेश सब्सिडी, ब्याज रियायतें और बिजली दरें प्रदान करने वाली औद्योगिक प्रोत्साहन योजना।
benefits_hi: स्थिर पूंजी निवेश पर 35% से 45% निवेश सब्सिडी।
100% स्टाम्प ड्यूटी और भूमि परिवर्तन शुल्क का पुनर्भरण।
पवला वड्डी योजना के तहत ब्याज सब्सिडी।

title: Nethanna Cheyutha (Thrift Fund)
description: A thrift fund saving scheme for handloom weavers in Telangana, where the weaver contributes 8% of wages and the government adds a matching 16% share.
benefits: Weaver's contribution: 8% of wages. Government matching contribution: 16% of wages.
Locked-in savings return with interest on maturity.
documents: Weaver Identity Card issued by department
eligibilityText: Active handloom weavers, ancillary workers, and powerloom weavers in Telangana.
exclusionText: Industrial textile mills workers or weavers not registered with the state department.

faqs.a: The scheme has a lock-in period of 36 months, after which weavers can withdraw the accrued thrift savings.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply to nearest Assistant Director of Handlooms and Textiles.
Join Handloom Weavers Cooperative Society.
Monthly thrift deduction and government credit accumulation.

checklist.text: Are you an active handloom weaver or ancillary worker in Telangana?

description_hi: तेलंगाना में हस्तशिल्प बुनकरों के लिए एक थ्रिफ्ट फंड बचत योजना, जहां बुनकर 8% मजदूरी का योगदान करता है और सरकार 16% शेयर का मैचिंग योगदान करती है।
ministry_hi: हस्तशिल्प और पारंपरिक वस्त्र विभाग, तेलंगाना
benefits_hi: बुनकर का योगदान: मजदूरी का 8%। सरकार का मैचिंग योगदान: मजदूरी का 16%।
मैचिंग सेविंग्स का लॉक-इन रिटर्न साथ ही ब्याज के साथ मैचिंग सेविंग्स का लॉक-इन रिटर्न
documents_hi: विभाग द्वारा जारी बुनकर पहचान पत्र

title: TSRTC Subsidized Student Bus Pass
description: Subsidized transport travel support for school and college students, offering free bus passes for school students and heavily discounted passes for college students.
benefits: Free travel pass for school students up to Class 10.
Up to 80% concession on monthly route passes for college and university students.
eligibilityText: Students studying in schools, colleges, or universities in Telangana recognized by the state board/UGC.
exclusionText: Students in distance education, correspondence, or non-recognized institutions.

faqs.q: Is it valid on AC buses?
faqs.a: No, passes are valid only in TSRTC Ordinary, Palle Velugu, Metro Express, and City Sheetal buses.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on TSRTC Bus Pass portal.
Enter student details, institution name, and select pass type.
Get application printed and attested by college head.
Submit at nearest TSRTC bus pass counter and pay fee.

checklist.text: Do you hold a bonafide student status in a recognized educational institute in Telangana?

description_hi: विद्यालय और कॉलेज के छात्रों के लिए सब्सिडाइज्ड परिवहन यात्रा सहायता, जो विद्यालय छात्रों के लिए मुफ्त बस पास और कॉलेज छात्रों के लिए भारी छूट वाले पास प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: विद्यालय छात्रों के लिए मुफ्त यात्रा पास (कक्षा 10 तक)।
कॉलेज और विश्वविद्यालय छात्रों के लिए मासिक मार्ग पास पर 80% छूट।
documents_hi: संस्थान के प्रमुख द्वारा जारी बोनाफाइड सर्टिफिकेट

title: Telangana Cyber Security Training
description: A government digital skilling program providing free certification and training in cyber security, cloud computing, and AI to unemployed graduates.
benefits: Free training and industry-recognized global cyber security certifications.
Job placement assistance and internships at T-Hub/IMAGE tower.
eligibilityText: Unemployed graduates in Telangana having a computer science or technical academic background.
exclusionText: Working professionals, or students currently studying in full-time courses.

faqs.a: The training modules range from 3 to 6 months.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on the TASK (Telangana Academy for Skill and Knowledge) portal.
Qualify in the technical entrance assessment.
Join the training batch and complete projects.

checklist.text: Do you possess a degree/diploma in computer science or a related technical discipline?

description_hi: एक सरकारी डिजिटल स्किलिंग कार्यक्रम जो बेरोजगार ग्रेजुएट्स को मुफ्त प्रमाणीकरण और प्रशिक्षण प्रदान करता है, जिसमें साइबर सुरक्षा, क्लाउड कंप्यूटिंग और एआई शामिल हैं।
ministry_hi: सूचना प्रौद्योगिकी, इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स और संचार, तेलंगाना
benefits_hi: मुफ्त प्रशिक्षण और वैश्विक साइबर सुरक्षा प्रमाणीकरण।
टी-हब/इमेज टावर में नौकरी की स्थिति सहायता और इंटर्नशिप।

title: Telangana Free Fish Seed Distribution
description: Agricultural allied program providing 100% subsidized fish seeds to inland fishermen cooperative societies to boost freshwater aquaculture.
benefits: 100% free supply of high-quality fish fingerlings and seeds (Rahu, Catla, Mrigal) for release in village tanks.
Subsidized fishing nets and ice boxes.
documents: Membership card in Primary Fishermen Cooperative Society (PFCS)
eligibilityText: Inland fishermen who are active members of recognized Fishermen Cooperative Societies in Telangana.
exclusionText: Individual private farm pond owners or non-members of societies.

faqs.a: All major, medium, and minor irrigation tanks in rural Telangana.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Society submits proposal to District Fisheries Officer.
Inspection of village tank water levels.
Fish seed units delivered at tank site by department trucks.

checklist.text: Are you an active registered member of a Primary Fishermen Cooperative Society in Telangana?

description_hi: कृषि संबंधित कार्यक्रम जो तेलंगाना के तटीय मछुआरों के सहकारी समितियों को ताजे पानी के मछली पालन को बढ़ावा देने के लिए 100% सब्सिडी वाले मछली बीज प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: गाँव के टैंकों में राहू, कातला, मृगाल जैसे उच्च गुणवत्ता वाले मछली अंडे और बीज की 100% मुफ्त आपूर्ति।
सब्सिडी वाले मछली जाल और आइस बॉक्स।
documents_hi: प्राथमिक मछुआरों के सहकारी समिति (पीएफसीएस) का सदस्यता कार्ड
गाँव के टैंक का आवंटन दस्तावेज

title: Telangana Giri Vikas Scheme
description: Welfare support providing free borewell drilling, motor installation, and power connection to small ST farmers to irrigate their fields.
ministry: Tribal Welfare Department, Government of Telangana
benefits: Free drilling of borewell in ST agricultural lands.
Free submersible motor pump, pipes, and electricity connection lines.
documents: Land Pattadar passbook (must own 2 to 5 acres of agricultural land)
eligibilityText: Small ST farmers in Telangana owning agricultural land without existing irrigation facilities.
exclusionText: Farmers owning more than 5 acres (large farmers) or non-ST farmers.

faqs.a: If a farmer owns less than 2 acres, they can form a group with adjacent ST farmers to apply jointly.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Submit application to local Tribal Welfare Officer.
Groundwater survey is conducted in the field.
Drilling rig is dispatched and borewell executed.
Subsidized pump installation.

checklist.text: Do you hold ST caste credentials and own cultivable agricultural land?
Do you certify that you have no existing working borewell or well on this plot?

description_hi: छोटे एसटी किसानों को अपने खेतों को सिंचित करने के लिए मुफ्त बोरवेल ड्रिलिंग, मोटर इंस्टॉलेशन और पावर कनेक्शन प्रदान करने वाली कल्याण सहायता प्रदान करने वाली योजना।
benefits_hi: एसटी कृषि भूमि में मुफ्त बोरवेल ड्रिलिंग।
मुफ्त सबमर्सिबल मोटर पंप, पाइप और बिजली कनेक्शन लाइनें।
documents_hi: भूमि पट्टदार पासबुक (कृपया 2 से 5 एकड़ कृषि भूमि का मालिक होना चाहिए)
जल निकासी भूगर्भ वैज्ञानिक की संभावना रिपोर्ट

title: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: A housing welfare scheme providing financial assistance to BPL rural families to construct permanent concrete houses with clean energy sanitation.
benefits: Financial assistance of ₹1.2 Lakhs in plain areas and ₹1.3 Lakhs in hilly/difficult areas.
Additional ₹95,000 via MGNREGA wages for 90 days labor.
₹12,000 toilet construction subsidy.
eligibilityText: Homeless rural families living in dilapidated houses listed in the SECC-2011 database.
exclusionText: Families owning a motorized 2/3/4 wheeler, landline, agricultural machinery, or having a government job.

faqs.a: No, the applicant must own a small piece of land or plot.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Beneficiary lists are generated from SECC-2011 database and approved by Gram Sabha.
Geo-tagging of the old house plot.
Sanction letter release and stage-wise fund transfer.

checklist.text: Do you certify that you do not own a permanent concrete (pucca) house in any part of the country?

description_hi: एक आवास कल्याण योजना जो सामाजिक सुरक्षा कार्यक्रम प्रदान करती है जो बीपीएल ग्रामीण परिवारों को स्थायी सीमेंट घर बनाने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है और स्वच्छ ऊर्जा स्वच्छता।
benefits_hi: सीधी क्षेत्रों में ₹1.2 लाख और पहाड़ी/कठिन क्षेत्रों में ₹1.3 लाख की वित्तीय सहायता।
90 दिनों के श्रम के लिए एमजीएनआरईजी वेतन के माध्यम से अतिरिक्त ₹95,000।
₹12,000 शौचालय निर्माण सब्सिडी।

title: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee)
description: A social security program guaranteeing at least 100 days of wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
benefits: Guaranteed unskilled manual work for up to 100 days in a year.
Direct wage credits to bank account within 15 days.
Unemployment allowance if work is not provided within 15 days of demand.
eligibilityText: Adult members of rural households willing to perform unskilled manual labor.
exclusionText: Urban residents, minors, or individuals unable to perform manual labor.

faqs.q: How far will the work site be?
faqs.a: Within 5 km radius of the village; otherwise, travel allowance is paid.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply to local Gram Panchayat for Job Card.
Receive Job Card within 15 days.
Submit written request for work to Panchayat.
Allotted work at a local project site.

checklist.text: Are you willing to do unskilled manual labor in rural areas?

title_hi: एमजीएनआरईजी (महात्मा गांधी राष्ट्रीय ग्रामीण रोजगार गारंटी)
description_hi: एक सामाजिक सुरक्षा कार्यक्रम जो प्रत्येक ग्रामीण परिवार को 100 दिनों का वेतन रोजगार प्रदान करता है जो अपने वयस्क सदस्यों को अनुभवहीन शारीरिक श्रम करने के लिए तैयार हैं।
benefits_hi: प्रति वर्ष 100 दिनों तक अनुभवहीन शारीरिक श्रम की गारंटी।
सीधे बैंक खाते में वेतन क्रेडिट 15 दिनों के भीतर।
काम प्रदान नहीं किए जाने पर 15 दिनों के भीतर बेरोजगारी भत्ता।

title: Pradhan Mantri Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: A clean energy welfare scheme providing free LPG connections to women from BPL and socio-economically deprived households.
benefits: Free LPG connection with double-burner stove and first cylinder refill free.
Subsidized refills under PMUY scheme directly to bank.
documents: Aadhaar Card of applicant and adult family members
eligibilityText: Adult women belonging to BPL households, forest dwellers, SC/ST, or tea tribes who do not have any existing LPG connection.
exclusionText: Households that already possess an active LPG connection from any public oil company.

faqs.a: No, the connection is strictly issued in the name of an adult woman of the family.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Submit application form at nearest LPG distributor office.
Submit KYC files, Aadhaar, and BPL Ration card.
Details matched against central de-duplication database.
Connection release.

checklist.text: Do you certify that your household does not possess any active LPG connection?

description_hi: एक स्वच्छ ऊर्जा कल्याण योजना जो बीपीएल और सामाजिक-आर्थिक रूप से वंचित परिवारों की महिलाओं को मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: मुफ्त एलपीजी कनेक्शन के साथ डबल-ब्यूर्नर स्टोव और पहला सिलेंडर भरने के लिए मुफ्त।
पीएमयू योजना के तहत सब्सिडी वाले भरने को सीधे बैंक में।
documents_hi: बीपीएल राशन कार्ड/14 बिंदु की घोषणा
आधार कार्ड के आवेदक और वयस्क परिवार के सदस्यों का

title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
description: A comprehensive crop insurance scheme protecting farmers from financial loss due to crop failure from natural calamities, pests, or diseases.
benefits: Financial compensation for crop loss due to drought, flood, pests, storms.
Extremely low farmer premium rates: 2% for Kharif, 1.5% for Rabi, 5% for commercial/horticulture.
eligibilityText: All farmers cultivating notified crops in notified areas, including tenant farmers.
exclusionText: Farmers cultivating non-notified crops or in areas not covered by state notifications.

faqs.q: Is it compulsory for loanee farmers?
faqs.a: It was previously compulsory, but now it is 100% voluntary for all farmers.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on PMFBY portal or visit nearest bank/Common Service Center (CSC).
Pay the farmer's share of premium before cutoff dates.
Obtain crop insurance policy receipt.

checklist.text: Are you cultivating a notified crop in a notified agro-climatic zone?

description_hi: एक व्यापक फसल बीमा योजना जो किसानों को प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों या रोगों के कारण फसल की हानि से आर्थिक नुकसान से बचाती है।
benefits_hi: प्राकृतिक आपदाओं, कीटों या रोगों के कारण फसल की हानि के लिए वित्तीय मुआवजा।
खरीफ के लिए 2%, रबी के लिए 1.5% और वाणिज्यिक/हार्टिकल्चर के लिए 5% के अत्यधिक कम किसान प्रीमियम दरें।
documents_hi: ग्राम विकास अधिकारी/एईओ से सिंचाई प्रमाण पत्र

title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
description: A credit support scheme providing farmers with timely access to short-term bank loans for crop cultivation, post-harvest costs, and animal husbandry.
benefits: Credit limit at highly subsidized interest rate of 4% (after prompt repayment rebate).
Flexible crop loan repayment cycles linked to crop harvesting.
Accidental insurance cover up to ₹50,000.
documents: Affidavit of no outstanding crop loan from other banks
eligibilityText: All land-owning farmers, tenant farmers, sharecroppers, and self-help groups of farmers.
exclusionText: Individuals who do not own cultivable land and are not involved in tenant crop sowing.

faqs.a: Yes, KCC limits are now extended to animal husbandry and fisheries farmers as well.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit your local commercial or cooperative bank branch.
Fill out the KCC application form and present land records.
Bank officer inspects field and determines credit limit.
Receive KCC ATM Debit Card.

checklist.text: Are you actively engaged in agriculture or allied animal husbandry activities?

description_hi: एक क्रेडिट सहायता योजना जो किसानों को समय पर कृषि उत्पादन, पोस्ट-हार्वेस्ट लागत और पशुपालन के लिए अल्पकालिक बैंक ऋण प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: 4% की अत्यधिक सब्सिडी वाली ब्याज दर पर क्रेडिट सीमा।
फसल की कटाई के साथ जुड़े क्रेडिट ऋण भुगतान चक्र।
अप्रत्याशित दुर्घटना बीमा कवर ₹50,000 तक।
documents_hi: किसी अन्य बैंक से कोई भी कृषि ऋण के बारे में प्रतिज्ञापत्र

title: PM SVANidhi (Street Vendor's Livelihood)
description: A micro-credit scheme providing street vendors with collateral-free working capital loans up to ₹10,000 to restart their businesses.
benefits: First loan up to ₹10,000. Second loan up to ₹20,000, and third loan up to ₹50,000 upon timely repayment.
7% interest subsidy directly credited to bank account.
Cashback incentives on digital transactions up to ₹1,200 per year.
documents: Certificate of Vending (CoV) or Letter of Recommendation (LoR)
eligibilityText: Street vendors and hawkers vending in urban areas on or before March 24, 2020.
exclusionText: Non-vendors or vendors without municipal records/letters of recommendation.

faqs.a: No, loans are 100% collateral-free and guaranteed by CGTMSE trust.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on PM SVANidhi portal or via a banking correspondent.
Upload Aadhaar and Certificate of Vending.
Lending bank processes and dispatches funds.

checklist.text: Are you engaged in street vending or selling goods on roadsides in urban areas?

description_hi: एक माइक्रो-क्रेडिट योजना जो सड़क विक्रेताओं को बिना बंधक के कार्यशील पूंजी ऋण ₹10,000 तक प्रदान करती है ताकि वे अपने व्यवसाय को फिर से शुरू कर सकें।
ministry_hi: गृह और शहरी मामलों के मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: पहला ऋण ₹10,000 तक। दूसरा ऋण ₹20,000 तक, और तीसरा ऋण ₹50,000 तक समय पर भुगतान पर।
7% ब्याज सब्सिडी सीधे बैंक खाते में जमा की जाती है।
डिजिटल लेनदेन पर कैशबैक इनसेंटिव ₹1,200 प्रति वर्ष तक।
documents_hi: वेंडिंग सर्टिफिकेट (CoV) या लेटर ऑफ रिकमेंडेशन (LoR)

title: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
description: A livelihood support scheme providing credit, skilling, and tools to traditional artisans and craftspeople like carpenters, cobblers, blacksmiths, and potters.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises
benefits: Artisan recognition card and certificate.
Skilling stipend of ₹500/day during training.
Toolbox incentive of ₹15,000.
Collateral-free enterprise development loans up to ₹3 Lakhs (5% interest rate).
eligibilityText: Indian artisans working with hands and tools in one of the 18 family-based traditional trades.
exclusionText: Government employees or family members who already availed credit under PMMY/Stand-Up India in last 3 years.

faqs.a: Carpenters, blacksmiths, potters, weavers, barbers, tailors, toy makers, etc.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on PM Vishwakarma portal at any CSC.
Biometric authentication and verification by Gram Panchayat/ULB.
District and national level committees approve.
Receive training modules and tool grant.

checklist.text: Are you engaged in one of the 18 notified traditional trades (carpenter, blacksmith, tailor, etc.)?

description_hi: एक जीवन यापन सहायता योजना जो पारंपरिक कारीगरों और कारीगरों को जैसे कारपेंटर, कोबलर, लोहार और पोते को क्रेडिट, स्किलिंग और उपकरण प्रदान करती है।
ministry_hi: माइक्रो, स्मॉल एंड मीडियम एंटरप्राइजेज मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: कारीगर प्रतिष्ठा पत्र और प्रमाण पत्र।
प्रशिक्षण के दौरान 500 रुपये प्रति दिन का स्किलिंग स्टाइपेंड।
टूलबॉक्स इनसेंटिव ₹15,000।
5% ब्याज दर पर बिना बंधक के उद्यम विकास ऋण ₹3 लाख तक।

title: Pradhan Mantri Kaushal Vikas Yojana (PMKVY)
description: A skill certification program offering free short-term vocational training, assessment, and placement assistance to unemployed youth.
benefits: 100% free skill training in 40+ sectors (IT, electronics, healthcare, apparel).
Government certificate on completion of course.
Stipend support and transition allowances during placement.
eligibilityText: Unemployed youth or school/college dropouts aged 15 to 45 years having valid identity cards.
exclusionText: Students pursuing full-time formal education, or active working professionals.

faqs.a: Courses range from 150 hours to 600 hours depending on the job role.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register on Skill India Digital portal.
Select a training course and nearest accredited training center.
Attend classes and clear the third-party assessment exam.
Receive certificate and join placement drives.

checklist.text: Are you currently not enrolled in a full-time school or college course?

description_hi: एक कौशल प्रमाणीकरण कार्यक्रम जो बेरोजगार युवाओं को मुफ्त अल्पकालिक व्यावसायिक प्रशिक्षण, मूल्यांकन और नौकरी की स्थिति में सहायता प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: 40+ क्षेत्रों में (आईटी, इलेक्ट्रॉनिक्स, स्वास्थ्य, कपड़ा) में 100% मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण।
पाठ्यक्रम पूरा करने पर सरकारी प्रमाण पत्र।
स्थानांतरण भत्ता और स्थानांतरण भत्ता के दौरान स्टाइपेंड सहायता।

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: A financial inclusion scheme providing zero-balance savings bank accounts with Rupay debit cards, overdraft facility, and accident insurance cover.
benefits: Zero-balance savings account with no minimum charge restrictions.
Free RuPay Debit Card with built-in ₹2 Lakh accidental insurance cover.
Overdraft facility up to ₹10,000 for eligible account holders.
eligibilityText: All Indian citizens who do not have an existing bank account.
exclusionText: Individuals who already own functional commercial savings accounts.

faqs.q: Is there a check for overdraft?
faqs.a: Overdraft up to ₹10,000 is given to one member per household (preferably the lady) after 6 months of active account operations.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit any bank branch, customer service point (CSP), or business correspondent kiosk.
Fill out the PMJDY account opening form.
Submit Aadhaar card copy and photo.
Receive welcome kit and RuPay card.

checklist.text: Do you certify that you do not hold a savings bank account in any bank?

description_hi: एक वित्तीय समावेशन योजना जो शून्य-शून्य बचत बैंक खाते के साथ रुपे डेबिट कार्ड, ओवरड्राफ्ट सुविधा, और दुर्घटना बीमा कवर के साथ प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: शून्य-शून्य बचत खाता जिसमें कोई न्यूनतम शुल्क प्रतिबंध नहीं है।
फ्री रुपे डेबिट कार्ड जिसमें 2 लाख रुपये का दुर्घटना बीमा कवर है।
उचित खाताधारकों के लिए ओवरड्राफ्ट सुविधा 10 लाख रुपये तक।

title: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY)
description: A low-cost term life insurance scheme providing ₹2 Lakhs cover for death due to any cause, at a premium of ₹436 per year.
benefits: Life insurance cover of ₹200,000 paid to the nominee in case of death of the subscriber.
Premium of ₹436 auto-debited annually.
eligibilityText: Indian citizens aged 18 to 50 years with a savings bank account and auto-debit consent.
exclusionText: Individuals above 50 years of age or those without active bank savings.

faqs.q: When does the risk cover start?
faqs.a: The risk cover starts 30 days after enrollment in the scheme.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit your bank branch or access net banking.
Submit the PMJJBY auto-debit consent form.
Ensure bank balance of ₹436 in May for auto-renewal.

checklist.text: Are you between 18 and 50 years old?

title_hi: प्रधान मंत्री जीवन ज्योति बीमा योजना (PMJJBY)
description_hi: एक कम लागत का टर्म लाइफ इंश्योरेंस योजना जो किसी भी कारण से मृत्यु के लिए 2 लाख रुपये का कवर प्रदान करती है, जिसकी प्रीमियम 436 रुपये प्रति वर्ष है।
benefits_hi: मृत्यु के मामले में नॉमिनी को 20 लाख रुपये का बीमा कवर दिया जाता है।
प्रीमियम 436 रुपये प्रति वर्ष के हिसाब से स्वचालित रूप से निकाला जाता है।

title: Pradhan Mantri Matru Vandana Yojana (PMMVY)
description: Maternity benefit cash incentive scheme to compensate for wage loss during pregnancy, promoting safe institutional health habits.
benefits: Direct cash benefit of ₹5,000 paid in installments for first child.
Cash incentive of ₹6,000 for the birth of a second girl child.
documents: MCP Card (Mother-Child Protection Card) showing vaccinations
Aadhaar Card of mother and husband
eligibilityText: Pregnant and lactating mothers for the first child or second girl child in the family.
exclusionText: Mothers who are in regular government or PSU employment, or receiving similar maternity benefits under other schemes.

faqs.q: Is the payment credited to husband's account?
faqs.a: No, it is strictly transferred via DBT to the mother's linked account.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register at nearest Anganwadi center or apply online on PMMVY portal.
Submit LMP date details and MCP card copy.
Verify birth certificate for subsequent installments.

checklist.text: Are you or your husband employed in a permanent government or public sector job?
