description_hi: गर्भावस्था के दौरान वेतन की हानि की भरपाई करने के लिए एक मातृत्व लाभ नकद प्रोत्साहन योजना जो सुरक्षित संस्थागत स्वास्थ्य आदतों को बढ़ावा देती है।
benefits_hi: पहले बच्चे के लिए 5,000 रुपये का सीधा नकद लाभ।
दूसरी लड़की के जन्म पर 6,000 रुपये का नकद प्रोत्साहन।
documents_hi: एमसीपी कार्ड (मदर-चाइल्ड प्रोटेक्शन कार्ड) जिसमें टीकाकरण का प्रमाण हो।
माँ और पति का आधार कार्ड
माँ के बैंक खाते के विवरण

title: Beti Bachao Beti Padhao (BBBP) Campaign
description: A national campaign aimed at addressing the declining Child Sex Ratio and promoting female education and girl welfare.
benefits: Sensitization programs, girl education awareness, safety audits.
Integration with girl child educational scholarships and savings plans.
eligibilityText: All girl children and their parents. Open to all Indian citizens.
exclusionText: None.

faqs.q: Is there a direct cash benefit?
faqs.a: BBBP is a campaign for social reform. Cash benefits are linked via secondary schemes like Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Participate in school enrollment campaigns for girls.
Get links to local post office saving accounts for girl children.

checklist.text: Are you seeking educational support and social integration for your girl child?

description_hi: एक राष्ट्रीय अभियान जो प्रतिगामी लिंगानुपात को संबोधित करने और महिला शिक्षा और लड़कियों के कल्याण को बढ़ावा देने के लिए प्रयास करता है।
benefits_hi: जागरूकता कार्यक्रम, लड़कियों की शिक्षा के बारे में जागरूकता, सुरक्षा ऑडिट।
लड़कियों की शिक्षा के लिए छात्रवृत्ति और बचत योजनाओं के साथ एकीकरण।

title: PM POSHAN (Mid-Day Meal Scheme)
description: A nutrition support scheme providing free hot cooked meals daily in government schools to improve student nutrition and school retention rates.
benefits: Free nutritious hot cooked meal every school working day.
Improves student attendance, focus, and health index.
eligibilityText: Students studying in Class 1 to 8 of government, local body, and government-aided schools.
exclusionText: Students studying in private schools or non-aided institutions.

faqs.q: What age group does it cover?
faqs.a: Typically children aged 6 to 14 years.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Enroll in any local government or government-aided school.
Meals are provided automatically in school daily during lunch break.

checklist.text: Are you studying in Class 1 to 8 in a government or government-aided school?

description_hi: एक पोषण समर्थन योजना जो सरकारी स्कूलों में प्रतिदिन मुफ्त गरम पके हुए भोजन प्रदान करती है ताकि छात्रों की पोषण स्थिति और स्कूली उपस्थिति की दर में सुधार हो।
benefits_hi: प्रत्येक स्कूल कार्य के दिन मुफ्त पौष्टिक गरम पके हुए भोजन।
छात्रों की उपस्थिति, ध्यान और स्वास्थ्य सूचकांक में सुधार।

title: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC)
description: A food security portability scheme enabling migrant BPL families to lift subsidized foodgrains from any Fair Price Shop (FPS) across India using their existing ration cards.
ministry: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food & Public Distribution
benefits: Access to subsidized rice, wheat, and coarse grains anywhere in the country.
Prevents cancellation of ration cards due to family migration.
documents: Existing State Ration Card linked with Aadhaar
eligibilityText: NFSA ration card holders, especially migrant workers and BPL beneficiaries.
exclusionText: Families who do not hold NFSA ration cards.

faqs.q: Does the entire family need to move?
faqs.a: No, any member can lift their share of foodgrains at their current location, while the rest is lifted by family back home.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Go to nearest FPS in any state, produce ration card number and Aadhaar, perform biometric authentication, and receive foodgrains.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid National Food Security Act (NFSA) ration card?

description_hi: एक भोजन सुरक्षा लचीलापन योजना जो प्रवासी बीपीएल परिवारों को अपने मौजूदा राशन कार्ड का उपयोग करके भारत भर में किसी भी फेयर प्राइस शॉप (एफपीएस) से सब्सिडी वाले खाद्यान्न उठाने की अनुमति देती है।
ministry_hi: उपभोक्ता मामले, खाद्य और सार्वजनिक वितरण मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: देशभर में सब्सिडी वाले चावल, गेहूं और कोआर्से अनाज तक पहुंच।
परिवार के प्रवास के कारण राशन कार्ड की रद्दी नहीं होने की सुरक्षा।
documents_hi: परिवार के सदस्यों का आधार कार्ड
आधार से जुड़ा मौजूदा राज्य राशन कार्ड

title: PM YASASVI Scholarship Scheme
description: A scholarship program for students belonging to Other Backward Classes (OBC), Economically Backward Class (EBC), and De-Notified Tribes (DNT) studying in top-class schools.
benefits: Full tuition fee reimbursement and hostel fee cover up to ₹75,000 per year for Class 9/10.
Up to ₹125,000 per year for Class 11/12 students.
eligibilityText: Students of Class 9 or 11 belonging to OBC/EBC/DNT categories with family income under ₹2.5 Lakhs.
exclusionText: General category students above income limit, or students of other classes.

faqs.a: Selection is based on the YASASVI Entrance Test merit list conducted by NTA.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register online on NTA YASASVI portal during application window.
Appear for the entrance exam.
Upload educational and category proof.
Funds released upon merit confirmation.

checklist.text: Do you belong to OBC, EBC, or DNT categories?

description_hi: एक छात्रवृत्ति कार्यक्रम जो अन्य पिछड़े वर्ग (ओबीसी), आर्थिक रूप से पिछड़े वर्ग (ईबीसी), और नोटिफाइड ट्राइब्स (डीएनटी) के छात्रों के लिए है, जो शीर्ष वर्ग के स्कूलों में पढ़ रहे हैं।
benefits_hi: कक्षा 9/10 के लिए प्रति वर्ष ₹75,000 तक की पूर्ण शुल्क छूट और होस्टल शुल्क कवर।
कक्षा 11/12 के लिए प्रति वर्ष ₹125,000 तक की छूट।
documents_hi: आय प्रमाण पत्र (परिवार का आय ₹2.5 लाख से कम)
नोटिफाइड स्कूल में प्रवेश प्रमाण पत्र

title: Post-Matric Scholarship for OBC Students
description: A centrally sponsored scheme providing financial aid to OBC students to pursue post-matriculation or post-secondary courses.
benefits: 100% reimbursement of non-refundable college fees.
Monthly academic allowance based on course groups.
documents: Income Certificate (family income under ₹2.5 Lakhs per year)
eligibilityText: OBC category students pursuing post-matric courses (Class 11 to PG). Domicile of respective state.
exclusionText: OBC students with family income exceeding ₹2.5 Lakhs per year, or students pursuing correspondence courses.

faqs.q: Is it open to all states?
faqs.a: Yes, it is implemented through state scholarship portals with central funding sharing.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on state scholarship portal or NSP.
Fill in course details, upload certificates.
College and district administration verify files and approve DBT credit.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid OBC caste certificate?

title_hi: ओबीसी छात्रों के लिए पोस्ट-मैट्रिक छात्रवृत्ति
description_hi: एक केंद्रीय प्रायोजित योजना जो ओबीसी छात्रों को पोस्ट-मैट्रिकुलेशन या पोस्ट-सेकेंडरी कोर्सों को पूरा करने के लिए वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करती है।
benefits_hi: नॉन-रिफंडेबल कॉलेज शुल्क का 100% भुगतान।
कोर्स समूहों के आधार पर मासिक शैक्षणिक अनुमति।
documents_hi: आय प्रमाण पत्र (परिवार का आय ₹2.5 लाख प्रति वर्ष)

title: National Fellowship for SC Students (NFSC)
description: Fellowship scheme for Scheduled Caste (SC) students pursuing M.Phil and Ph.D. in science, humanities, and social sciences at recognized universities.
benefits: Monthly JRF fellowship of ₹37,000 (increased to ₹40,000+) for first 2 years.
Monthly SRF fellowship of ₹42,000 for remaining years.
HRA and contingency grants.
eligibilityText: SC students who have qualified UGC-NET or Joint CSIR-UGC Test and are registered in full-time M.Phil/Ph.D. courses.
exclusionText: Part-time PhD scholars, or candidates who have already availed other national fellowships.

faqs.a: The fellowship is granted for a maximum period of 5 years.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Qualify in UGC-NET exam.
Register for PhD at a UGC recognized university.
Apply online on UGC/Ministry fellowship portal.
Submit quarterly progress report for monthly stipend release.

checklist.text: Are you registered as a full-time M.Phil/Ph.D. scholar in a recognized university?

title_hi: राष्ट्रीय अनुसूचित जाति छात्रों के लिए फेलोशिप (एनएफएससी)
description_hi: विज्ञान, मानविकी, और सामाजिक विज्ञान में म.फिल और पीएच.डी. के लिए अनुसूचित जाति (एससी) छात्रों के लिए फेलोशिप योजना।
benefits_hi: पहले 2 वर्षों के लिए मासिक जेआरएफ फेलोशिप ₹37,000 (बढ़कर ₹40,000+)।
बाकी वर्षों के लिए मासिक एसआरएफ फेलोशिप ₹42,000।
एचआरए और आपातकालीन अनुमति।
documents_hi: पीएच.डी. के लिए विश्वविद्यालय पंजीकरण पत्र

title: National Fellowship for ST Students (NFHE)
description: Fellowship support for Scheduled Tribe (ST) students pursuing M.Phil/Ph.D. degrees in Indian universities.
benefits: Financial stipend of ₹37,000/month for JRF, ₹42,000/month for SRF.
Annual contingency allowance and HRA benefits.
eligibilityText: ST students pursuing full-time Ph.D./M.Phil in Indian universities.
exclusionText: Candidates with family income exceeding ₹6 Lakhs per year (if income limit applies) or part-time scholars.

faqs.a: Priority is given to NET-qualified candidates, but selection is made through a combined score ranking.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on Ministry of Tribal Affairs portal.
Upload PG marks, PhD registration certificate, and caste proof.
Ministry releases list of selected ST scholars.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid ST caste certificate?

title_hi: राष्ट्रीय अनुसूचित जनजाति छात्रों के लिए फेलोशिप (एनएफएचई)
description_hi: भारतीय विश्वविद्यालयों में एम.फिल/पीएच.डी. के लिए अनुसूचित जनजाति (एसटी) छात्रों के लिए फेलोशिप सहायता।
benefits_hi: जेआरएफ के लिए मासिक वित्तीय अनुमति ₹37,000, एसआरएफ के लिए ₹42,000।
वार्षिक आपातकालीन अनुमति और एचआरए लाभ।
documents_hi: पीएच.डी. के लिए प्रवेश प्रमाण पत्र

title: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme (SISFS)
description: Financial assistance for early-stage startups to build proof of concept, prototype development, product trials, and market entry.
benefits: Grants up to ₹20 Lakhs for validation of proof of concept, prototype development.
Debt-linked investment up to ₹50 Lakhs for market entry, commercialization through incubators.
documents: Detailed Business Plan and milestone projections
eligibilityText: Startups recognized by DPIIT, incorporated not more than 2 years ago, with a viable business model using technology.
exclusionText: Startups older than 2 years, or those who have already received more than ₹10 Lakhs monetary support from other government schemes.

faqs.q: Do I apply directly to the ministry?
faqs.a: No, startups apply online and select their preferred incubators. Incubators evaluate and disburse the seed fund.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register startup on Startup India portal and get DPIIT recognition number.
Apply on SISFS portal, select up to 3 incubators.
Present prototype to incubator committee.
Sanction and release of milestone-based seed fund.

checklist.text: Is your startup recognized by DPIIT (Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade)?

description_hi: शुरुआती चरण के स्टार्टअप को वित्तीय सहायता प्रदान करने के लिए प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट, प्रोटोटाइप विकास, उत्पाद परीक्षण और बाजार प्रवेश के लिए।
benefits_hi: प्रूफ ऑफ कॉन्सेप्ट की सत्यापन, प्रोटोटाइप विकास के लिए ₹20 लाख तक के अनुदान।
बाजार प्रवेश, व्यावसायिककरण के माध्यम से ₹50 लाख तक के ऋण से जुड़े निवेश।
documents_hi: विस्तृत व्यवसाय योजना और मील के पत्थर की प्रोजेक्शन

title: CGTMSE (Credit Guarantee Fund for MSEs)
description: A credit guarantee support scheme providing collateral-free credit facilities to micro and small enterprises through partner lending institutions.
ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises
benefits: Credit guarantee cover up to 85% for loans up to ₹5 Crores.
Allows entrepreneurs to secure bank loans without pledging residential property or land collateral.
documents: Balance sheet of last 3 years (for existing units)
eligibilityText: New and existing Micro and Small Enterprises engaged in manufacturing or services activity.
exclusionText: Retail trade businesses (with certain exemptions), educational institutions, agriculture, and self-help groups.

faqs.q: What is the maximum loan limit covered?
faqs.a: Up to ₹5 Crores limit can be covered under CGTMSE guarantee.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Prepare business plan and approach a public/private bank registered with CGTMSE.
Sanction the loan eligibility.
Bank applies to CGTMSE for credit guarantee cover.
Artisan pays guarantee fee, loan is disbursed.

checklist.text: Are you seeking a bank loan for your business without providing third-party collateral?

title_hi: CGTMSE (माइक्रो और छोटे उद्यमों के लिए क्रेडिट गारंटी फंड)
description_hi: एक क्रेडिट गारंटी समर्थन योजना जो माइक्रो और छोटे उद्यमों को साझा ऋणदाता संस्थानों के माध्यम से कॉलेटरल-फ्री क्रेडिट सुविधाएं प्रदान करती है।
ministry_hi: माइक्रो, छोटे और मध्यम उद्यम मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: लोन के लिए 85% तक का क्रेडिट गारंटी कवर ₹5 करोड़ तक।
उद्यमियों को घरेलू संपत्ति या जमीन के कॉलेटरल के बिना बैंक ऋण सुरक्षित करने की अनुमति देता है।
documents_hi: पिछले 3 वर्षों के लिए बैलेंस शीट (मौजूदा इकाइयों के लिए)

title: Swachh Bharat Mission (Urban) - IHHL
description: Welfare subsidy for urban households to construct Individual Household Latrines (IHHL) to ensure open-defecation-free cities.
benefits: Financial subsidy of ₹4,000 (matched by state shares up to ₹10,800 total) paid in two installments for toilet construction.
documents: Photograph of the toilet plot before construction
eligibilityText: Urban BPL households who do not have access to household toilets.
exclusionText: Urban households that already possess a constructed bathroom toilet.

faqs.a: No, the owner must apply, or tenant must get owner consent.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on SBM Urban portal.
Upload photo of vacant space.
Verification by municipal engineer.
Disbursement of first installment.

checklist.text: Do you certify that you currently do not have a functional toilet in your household?

title_hi: शौचालय मुक्त शहरों के लिए स्वच्छ भारत मिशन (शहरी)
description_hi: शहरी घरों को व्यक्तिगत घरेलू शौचालय (आईएचएचएल) निर्माण के लिए कल्याण सब्सिडी प्रदान करने के लिए।
ministry_hi: वनावास और शहरी मामलों के मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: दो किस्तों में ₹4,000 (राज्य शेयरों के मैच किए गए ₹10,800 कुल) के लिए वित्तीय सब्सिडी प्राप्त करने के लिए शौचालय निर्माण के लिए।
documents_hi: शौचालय प्लॉट के पूर्व निर्माण का फोटोग्राफ

title: Swachh Bharat Mission (Gramin) - IHHL
description: Sanitation subsidy for rural households to build toilets, offering cash incentives to promote hygiene.
benefits: Subsidy grant of ₹12,000 for constructing a functional double-pit pour-flush latrine.
eligibilityText: Rural households, BPL families, and SC/ST/Small marginal farmers who do not own a toilet.
exclusionText: Rural households possessing pre-existing toilet systems.

faqs.a: Gram Panchayat secretary and Swachhagrahi verify by taking geo-tagged photos of completed toilet.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Submit details to Gram Panchayat or apply online on SBM-G portal.
Drill pit and build toilet.
Geo-tagging verification.

checklist.text: Do you reside in a rural area and lack a household toilet?

title_hi: शौचालय निर्माण के लिए स्वच्छ भारत मिशन (ग्रामीण)
description_hi: ग्रामीण घरों को शौचालय निर्माण के लिए स्वच्छता सब्सिडी प्रदान करने के लिए।
benefits_hi: दोगुने पिट फ्लश शौचालय के निर्माण के लिए ₹12,000 का सब्सिडी अनुदान।

title: Jal Jeevan Mission (Har Ghar Jal)
description: A public utility program providing safe, piped drinking water tap connections to every rural household in India.
benefits: Free installation of Functional Household Tap Connection (FHTC).
Ensures supply of 55 liters of water per capita per day of prescribed quality.
eligibilityText: All rural households in India. Priority to drought-prone and tribal villages.
exclusionText: Urban areas (covered under AMRUT scheme) or households already possessing domestic tap connections.

faqs.q: Do I have to pay monthly?
faqs.a: Gram Panchayat water committee (VWSC) decides nominal maintenance charge.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Village water committee maps all houses.
Laying of water pipes and installing home taps.
Free water quality testing kits demo.

checklist.text: Does your rural house lack an active drinking water tap connection?

description_hi: भारत में हर ग्रामीण घर को सुरक्षित, पाइपित पेयजल टैप कनेक्शन प्रदान करने के लिए एक सार्वजनिक उपयोगिता कार्यक्रम।
benefits_hi: फंक्शनल हाउसहोल्ड टैप कनेक्शन (एफएचटीसी) के लिए मुफ्त स्थापना।
निर्धारित गुणवत्ता के अनुसार प्रति व्यक्ति प्रतिदिन 55 लीटर पानी की आपूर्ति।

title: Sovereign Gold Bond (SGB) Scheme
description: Government-backed gold investment bonds issued by Reserve Bank of India, offering annual interest and capital appreciation.
ministry: Reserve Bank of India / Ministry of Finance
benefits: Fixed interest rate of 2.5% per annum paid semi-annually.
No capital gains tax on maturity.
Alternative to holding physical gold safely.
eligibilityText: Resident Indian individuals, HUFs, Trusts, and Universities.
exclusionText: Non-resident Indians (NRIs) and corporate business firms.

faqs.a: Minimum subscription of 1 gram and maximum of 4 kg of gold for individuals per fiscal year.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online through commercial banks, post offices, or stock brokers.
Pay online (gets ₹50/gram discount).
RBI issues holding certificate.

checklist.text: Do you hold a valid Permanent Account Number (PAN) card?

description_hi: भारतीय रिजर्व बैंक द्वारा जारी सरकारी समर्थित सोने के निवेश बांड, जो वार्षिक ब्याज और पूंजी वृद्धि प्रदान करते हैं।
benefits_hi: नियमित ब्याज दर 2.5% प्रति वर्ष का भुगतान किया जाता है, जो छह महीने में किया जाता है।
पूर्णता पर कोई पूंजीगत लाभ कर नहीं है।
भौतिक सोने को सुरक्षित रूप से रखने का विकल्प।

title: PM SHRI Schools Program
description: A central school upgrading scheme designed to showcase premium pedagogy and infrastructure in government schools.
benefits: Upgraded digital classrooms, laboratories, vocational workshops in selected schools.
High-standard curriculum and safe infrastructure for students.
eligibilityText: Students enrolled in government schools that are selected for PM SHRI upgrade.
exclusionText: Private school students.

faqs.a: Schools apply online, and are selected based on key performance indices.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Enroll child in a designated PM SHRI government school.
Avail high-fidelity learning models and free tablets/books.

checklist.text: Are you studying in a government school chosen for the PM SHRI upgrade?

description_hi: सरकारी स्कूलों को अपग्रेड करने के लिए एक केंद्रीय स्कूल अपग्रेडिंग योजना, जो सरकारी स्कूलों में प्रीमियम शिक्षा और संरचना को प्रदर्शित करने के लिए डिज़ाइन की गई है।
benefits_hi: चयनित स्कूलों में उन्नत डिजिटल कक्षाएं, प्रयोगशालाएं और व्यावसायिक कार्यशालाएं।
विद्यार्थियों के लिए उच्च मानक का कार्यक्रम और सुरक्षित संरचना।

title: Deendayal Antyodaya Yojana - NRLM
description: A livelihood program organizing rural poor women into Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and providing bank loans and vocational grants.
benefits: Interest subvention on bank loans (reducing rate to 7% or lower).
Revolving fund of ₹20,000 to ₹30,000 per SHG.
Community Investment Fund support.
documents: Bank saving account passbook of group
eligibilityText: Rural women belonging to BPL households organized into active Self-Help Groups.
exclusionText: Urban residents or groups containing male members.

faqs.q: How many members in an SHG?
faqs.a: Normally 10 to 20 rural women form one SHG.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Form a Self-Help Group of BPL women in the village.
Open joint savings bank account in group name.
Register group on DAY-NRLM portal via village organization.

checklist.text: Are you a member of a registered women's Self Help Group (SHG) in your village?

description_hi: एक जीवनयापन कार्यक्रम जो ग्रामीण गरीब महिलाओं को स्व-मित्र समूहों (एसएचजी) में संगठित करता है और बैंक ऋण और व्यावसायिक अनुदान प्रदान करता है।
benefits_hi: बैंक ऋण पर ब्याज सब्सिडी (दर को 7% या उससे कम तक कम करना)।
एसएचजी के लिए घुमावदार फंड रुपये 20,000 से 30,000 प्रति एसएचजी।
समुदाय निवेश फंड समर्थन।
documents_hi: समूह के बैंक बचत खाता पासबुक

title: DAY-NULM (National Urban Livelihoods Mission)
description: Welfare support providing urban poor with skill training, micro-enterprise loans, and shelter facilities.
benefits: Free skill training with placement assistance.
Subsidized interest rate loans (up to 7% simple interest) up to ₹2 Lakhs for individual business.
eligibilityText: Urban poor, homeless, and street vendors residing in municipal limits.
exclusionText: Rural residents or families above BPL income limits.

faqs.a: Yes, 100% funded urban shelter houses are run by municipal corporations under this mission.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Contact municipal resource cell or urban local body office.
Apply for skill course or enterprise loan.
ULB verifies urban BPL status and sanctions credit.

checklist.text: Are you a resident of an urban municipal town holding BPL credentials?

description_hi: शहरी गरीबों को कौशल प्रशिक्षण, माइक्रो-उद्यम ऋण और आश्रय सुविधाएं प्रदान करने वाला कल्याण समर्थन।
ministry_hi: स्वास्थ्य और शहरी मामलों के मंत्रालय
benefits_hi: मुफ्त कौशल प्रशिक्षण के साथ स्थानीयकरण सहायता।
व्यक्तिगत व्यवसाय के लिए सब्सिडी ब्याज दर ऋण (7% साधारण ब्याज दर तक) रुपये 2 लाख तक।
documents_hi: शहरी बीपीएल राशन कार्ड/आय प्रमाण पत्र

title: Lakhpati Didi Scheme
description: A women micro-enterprise training initiative targeting rural SHG women to help them earn a sustainable income of at least ₹1 Lakh per year.
benefits: Skill training in technical areas (LED bulb making, drone operations, agriculture technology).
Interest-free business loans up to ₹5 Lakhs.
Market linkage with e-commerce platforms.
eligibilityText: Active women members of Rural Self-Help Groups (SHGs) under DAY-NRLM.
exclusionText: Women who are not members of any SHG, or urban residents.

faqs.a: Under 'Namo Drone Didi', selected women are trained to fly agricultural drones for crop spraying.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Express interest in Lakhpati Didi module during SHG meetings.
Register on DAY-NRLM dashboard.
Participate in skill training and secure the micro-finance loan.

checklist.text: Are you an active member of a registered village Self-Help Group (SHG)?

description_hi: एक महिला माइक्रो-उद्यम प्रशिक्षण पहल, जो ग्रामीण एसएचजी महिलाओं को उनके कम से कम रुपये 1 लाख प्रति वर्ष की स्थिर आय प्राप्त करने में मदद करने के लिए लक्षित करती है।
benefits_hi: तकनीकी क्षेत्रों में कौशल प्रशिक्षण (एलईडी बल्ब बनाना, ड्रोन संचालन, कृषि प्रौद्योगिकी)।
रुपये 5 लाख तक के ब्याज-मुक्त व्यवसाय ऋण।
ई-कॉमर्स प्लेटफ़ॉर्मों के साथ बाजार संबंध।

title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Maandhan Yojana (PM-KMY)
description: A voluntary pension scheme for small and marginal farmers, ensuring a monthly pension of ₹3,000 after attaining age 60.
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after 60 years of age.
50% premium contributed by the farmer, 50% matching contribution by Central Government.
documents: Pattadar passbook showing land ownership (under 2 hectares)
Consent form for auto-debit of premium
eligibilityText: Small and marginal farmers holding cultivable land up to 2 hectares (5 acres), aged 18 to 40 years.
exclusionText: Farmers owning more than 2 hectares, or members of other statutory pensions (EPFO, NPS, APY).

faqs.a: Monthly premium ranges from ₹55 to ₹200 depending on the entry age (18 to 40).
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit nearest Common Service Center (CSC) or apply online.
Submit Aadhaar and bank details.
CSC operator registers, system auto-calculates premium, print card.

checklist.text: Do you own cultivable agricultural land of 2 hectares (5 acres) or less?

title: Pradhan Mantri Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM)
description: A pension plan for unorganized workers like street vendors, cobblers, rickshaw pullers, and domestic helps, providing ₹3,000 monthly pension.
benefits: Guaranteed pension of ₹3,000/month after age 60.
Co-contributory pension structure with equal government share.
eligibilityText: Unorganized workers aged 18 to 40 years whose monthly income is ₹15,000 or less.
exclusionText: Workers covered under EPFO, ESIC, NPS, or paying income tax.

faqs.a: Premium is auto-debited monthly from the savings account.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Go to nearest CSC or apply online on Maandhan portal.
Verify bank account and auto-debit consent.
Receive PM-SYM Card with unique pension number.

checklist.text: Are you working in the unorganized sector (domestic help, street vendor, construction worker, etc.)?
Is your monthly income ₹15,000 or less?

title: PM Vyapari Maan-dhan Yojana
description: A pension program for small shopkeepers, retail traders, and self-employed merchants, providing a monthly pension of ₹3,000.
benefits: Guaranteed monthly pension of ₹3,000 after 60 years.
Matching contribution from Central Government.
documents: GSTIN number (if annual turnover is above ₹40 Lakhs)
eligibilityText: Small traders, shopkeepers, and self-employed people aged 18 to 40 years with annual turnover under ₹1.5 Crore.
exclusionText: Income tax payers or members of EPFO/ESIC/NPS.

faqs.a: Only if your annual business turnover exceeds ₹40 Lakhs.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit nearest CSC.
Submit bank account auto-debit consent and Aadhaar.
Issue of Vyapari pension card.

checklist.text: Is your annual business turnover ₹1.5 Crore or less?

title: PM Bhartiya Janaushadhi Pariyojana
description: A public health scheme providing high-quality generic medicines at affordable prices through dedicated Janaushadhi Kendras.
ministry: Department of Pharmaceuticals / Ministry of Chemicals & Fertilizers
benefits: Generic medicines available at 50% to 90% cheaper rates than branded market equivalents.
Ensures access to essential healthcare for poor families.
documents: Valid medical prescription from a registered doctor
eligibilityText: Open to all citizens. No income or caste restrictions.
exclusionText: None. Open to everyone holding a valid medical prescription.

faqs.a: Yes, all generic drugs are tested at NABL accredited labs before sale.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Visit any PM Janaushadhi Kendra shop.
Present doctor's prescription.
Purchase generic medicines at highly discounted prices.

checklist.text: Do you possess a medical prescription from a registered medical practitioner?

title: YSR Rythu Bharosa (Andhra Pradesh)
description: Flagship welfare scheme in Andhra Pradesh providing financial assistance of ₹13,500 per year to farming families.
benefits: Financial support of ₹13,500 per annum paid in three installments (Rs 7,500, Rs 4,000, Rs 2,000).
Free borewell drilling and crop insurance support.
eligibilityText: Land-owning farmers and tenant farmers in Andhra Pradesh. Domicile of AP.
exclusionText: Corporate landholders, government employees, and institutional landholders.

faqs.a: Yes, tenant farmers belonging to SC, ST, BC, and minority groups receive the same amount.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Register land records on Webland AP portal.
Submit details to village agriculture assistant (VAA).
DBT credit based on state schedule.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident and farmer in Andhra Pradesh?

title: Gruha Jyothi Scheme (Karnataka)
description: A public utility welfare scheme in Karnataka providing up to 200 units of free domestic electricity to households.
benefits: Up to 200 units of free electricity per month for domestic connections.
Saves up to ₹1,000 per month on household utility bills.
documents: Electricity Consumer Account ID (linked to RR number)
eligibilityText: Domestic electricity consumers in Karnataka whose average monthly consumption is under 200 units.
exclusionText: Commercial connections, or consumers whose average consumption exceeds 200 units.

faqs.a: Yes, tenants residing in Karnataka houses can apply using rent agreement.
Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) directly to Aadhaar seeded bank account.

steps: Apply online on Seva Sindhu portal.
Link your consumer account with Aadhaar.
Receive zero billing if usage is within eligibility limit.

checklist.text: Is the electricity connection for domestic residential use (not commercial)?
Are you a resident of Karnataka?

title: PM-POSHAN Nutrition Support for Primary Schools
description: A flagship digital welfare initiative providing socioeconomic development support and benefits to citizens under Ministry of Education.
benefits: Financial subsidy of up to 50% or matching monetary assistance under PM-POSHAN Nutrition Support for Primary Schools.
Direct benefit transfer to bank or subsidized coupons.
documents: Bank Account Passbook linked with Aadhaar
eligibilityText: Citizens qualifying under structural guidelines of PM-POSHAN Nutrition Support for Primary Schools.
exclusionText: Government employees and taxpayers are excluded.

faqs.q: How long does validation take under PM-POSHAN Nutrition Support for Primary Schools?
faqs.a: Typically 15 to 30 days once submitted.
Yes, through local Gram Panchayat or Municipal ward offices.

steps: Visit official portal https://education.gov.in/.
Submit registration profile and link Aadhaar.
Wait for block evaluation and grant approval.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident of the beneficiary area?

Wait for block evaluation and grant approval.

checklist.text: Are you a permanent resident of the beneficiary area?

eligibilityText: Citizens qualifying under structural guidelines of Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY).
